### Scompy — 2017-02-25T05:34:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-209263>

**Scompy's nnEMF related info and discoveries:**

My doctor contacted me about a patient that wanted to have someone measure her home for nnEMFs. So I volunteered my services as a citizen scientist for her. The woman had cancer in the past, massive headaches daily, and to this day, she's actively EHS in a very blunt way. Anytime she got into a magnetic or electrical field above 10 milliGauss, she would \*instantly\* start feeling tingles in her hands and arms. She had to move out of her home entirely and move into her son's home. I didn't tell her that was why she was still alive (after I measured her home).

I first went to her son's home and measured the nnEMFs going on in them (and outside of them). Both her son and son's wife looked on the unhealthy side I could tell. As it turned out, they both had CPAP machines they were using nightly. On their bed-stands, they had both machines and a normal fan behind their heads they'd use when it gets too hot inside. They also had a 'wall of electronics' in their bedroom with an active WiFi router on it with the TV, video recorders, charging station, etc.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

The largest problem in the room were the CPAP machines. Each emitted 30milliGauss fields a foot away while OFF. When I measured the head-space, this was about a 5 to 8 milliGauss field, and still over a 3 milliGauss field in the center of the bed. Could their CPAPs be both the cause of their problems with the illusion of medicine during a full-night's sleep? Major facepalm. Yes, they were using the CPAPs all night long to destroy their mitochondria during their regeneration cycles.

Next up was the router. I let them know to shut it off in the evening and at night in particular, or back-block the RF from it. Once they knew and also turned it off, I was experiencing some RF from elsewhere. So after another 10mins of investigation, it turned out they have a smart-meter outside their bedroom that pulsed every 5 seconds. About a foot away from it, the emissions were not as strong as I expected though, more like 10 milliWatts per square meter, but I was still getting about 0.01 to 0.1 mW/sq m. through their window from it. Not too terrible, but imagine this, plus router in bedroom, plus CPAP dirty electricity.

This wasn't their major problem though. After measuring their kitchen and microwave, they were the 'normal high' volumes I see in most homes. About 5 foot radius falloffs from their dimmers, oven and the LED from their microwave oven. When testing their microwave, I had the EHS lady stand 20 feet back away, but she still felt a shock pulse through her body. My Trifield picked up a ton of microwave 15 feet away on the back-wall in their living room. Still, this wasn't their main problem due to a lower frequency of use.

In their study/living area, they had a computer setup that looked quite normal. I measured and everything was fine. But then I asked her to turn on the computer. After booting it up, something was going off the charts at 100 milliGauss dirty electrical EMF. It took me another 5mins to pin-down what was going on. Along the right-side of his monitor, it put my Trifield to max. This is exactly where a person would put their hands touching a mouse because the monitor was about 2 feet from the chair. Even at the mouse space with square-root falloff, it was 60+ milliGauss! The rest of the home had 'normal issues' beyond these reported.

Next up was the original home where she had moved-out from. Of course, upon driving up to her home, there is cell phone mobile tower within 500 feet on the hill above them. I immediately thought this was going to be her main problem. I was shocked it wasn't. Now, the mobile phone tower was still a problem...outside I was getting average pings of 0.5 to 5 milliWatts per square meter all of time, but this was being tested around 7pm. Not healthy, but I've seen worse cell towers in the past at this distance away. Different peak times matter also.

The home was adobe and when getting inside and took my first measurements of the RF EMFs, I was surprised to see the readings just about bottom out. I realized the wall construction must have been built with a metal mesh for the adobe that gave the home a natural faraday-cage like influence that blocked out most of the RF. But, upon entering the home, I already 'felt a hum' in the air standing there measuring the RF and it was already activating my tinnitus, so I knew something was wrong immediately.

Switching to electrical EMFs gave me nothing, but switching to magnetic EMFs, the entire space from head to foot was saturated in a 90 milliGauss field at the front door. Now, walking inside down a 15 foot hallway into the kitchen, that ENTIRE SPACE was also completely saturated with the same field. Other people were in the home and sitting at the kitchen table. From a sitting position, it was around a 40 to 50 milliGauss field. So, to get an idea of what was happening, about a 35 foot length, 15 feet wide and from floor to ceiling was being saturated in magnetic EMF between about 20 mGauss and 90 mGauss. The farther away from the ceiling toward the floor, the more the milliGauss fell off and reduced down from 90-->20 mG. I knew it was coming from the ceiling and there were about 8 different lights built-into the ceiling along that entire path.

The EHS woman already started feeling bad I could tell. I had them start shutting down the overhead lights, and noticed they were connected to a dimmer also. They had about x3 dimmers in a row and finally when that main chain was shut down (about 8 lights in a row), the field was cut down by about 75%. Granted, if I put my meter up high with the LIGHTS OFF, I was still getting in the 30 milliGauss range, but around head-level 6 feet of the ground, it was down to about 6 milliGauss in the hallway-->kitchen. In the kitchen itself now at the table, I was getting down to about 2 to 4 milliGauss. Still not that acceptable, but at least not insanely high in intensity. But standing at the table, a person would be in 6 to 8 mG.

In addition to this problem, they had just as bad of a problem in their master bedroom. Same type of intensity around 60 mG, but this time with an electric field (instead of a magnetic field) and their overhead ceiling lighting. I suspect a few problems: 1. they have a major short in their ceiling, 2. a short at the dimmers themselves, 3. their wiring is ungrounded badly, 4. there is some badly grounded wiring from their circuit-breaker box to the wiring.

The only other major problem they had were the windows where you could look out and see the cell phone tower and getting some RF. Also, they had a router in their office, and the office had higher than normal levels of RF. Their router within 1-foot was giving off 70 milliWatts per square meter....unacceptable. Plus, because the walls had internal mesh for the adobe, it was most likely making an internal faraday cage. See the irony? Giant cell tower you could see outside, but the router inside was making a bigger problem for them. Also, spending time indoors talking on the cellphone from a faraday-cage-like environment, because of the proximity to the tower, would make the RF more powerful to make the connection.

What was interesting is that they had some very safe spaces in the home. They had 2 cacti in one room that had bottomed out nnEMFs... and giant windows on the opposite side of the tower, so great sunlight potential also. Their bathrooms were also no EMFs, and they had a shower with a concrete floor so they could actually shower and ground at the same time. They were also lucky they didn't have a smart-meter yet... still an old analog meter.

**Round 2:**

\* CPAP was a newer ResMed and had bluetooth at 2.4 Ghz but I didn't see much density coming off of them. Also had a magnetic field with the electrical field, but had about a 2-to-3 foot falloff from the source. So moving the units farther back was the best hack for them.

\* I figured out that their bed was a MEDICAL ONE and was electric so it could adjust higher or lower, even though they didn't use it. I measured and found a 15 milliGauss field in the CENTER of the bed WTF! So after unplugging the cord from the wall, it went back down to 0 milliGauss. This was their major problem, and probably why they BOTH needed their CPAPs.

\* They replaced their dirty electricity monitor and their workspace is beautiful now.

\* Hacking out many of the dimmers solved most problems with dirty electricity coming out a few feet into many spaces.

\*. Okay, at the main home, I worked with the electrician (and educated him). After spending 2+ hours doing a lot of trial and error, we were able to mitigate the hallway and kitchen areas SOMEWHAT. Instead of strong fields down the hall in the 90 milliGauss range, putting in a standard switch and ripping out the dimmers pulled it down to the 15 milliGauss range. Then, when the kitchen lights were on, another magnetic field penetrated all the way down the hallway around 8 milliGauss. This is a very head-scratching moment because it appears that when the kitchen lights are on and the hallway lights are off, the hallway has a huge field near the ceiling, and visa-versa...when the hallways lights are on, the hallway lights create a field under them, but also they extend out all of the way into the kitchen with the kitchen lights off. Removing the dimmers looked to cut the EMF density down by x4 overall, and now in the kitchen, the sitting space was down to about 1.5 milliGauss. If I were to guess, there's some type of magnetic or electrical field swapping between the lights, or maybe a neutral shared or some type of shared wiring that's causing a flood of magnetic field into the space.

The takeaway for their main home...once they get an electrician to solve their wiring problems, if they toss the router and maybe get back-blocking curtains for their windows facing the cell tower, they could have a safer place. However, I personally couldn't spend much time outside the front of the home near the mobile tower for any longer periods. This is one lens into what building biologists do. The formula for mitigation is becoming more and more complex as new technologies are intersecting our worlds with many new methods also such as 5G. It's only going to get harder and harder to escape, but don't fear this crap... Instead, I have the attitude to not let the fear of any poison control me and put me in my place. Instead, I attack the problems head-on and call them out for others to see so they understand how the poison is working in their lives.

Cool video. Can't wait to get some meters and test like you are.
Does that sun meter detect uva and uvb? How accurate do you find it compared to say the d minder app or weather chart guidelines.?

### Scompy — 2017-02-27T00:22:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-209354>

> [OptimalSkr said:](/goto/post?id=209327)
>
> Cool video. Can't wait to get some meters and test like you are.
> Does that sun meter detect uva and uvb? How accurate do you find it compared to say the d minder app or weather chart guidelines.?

The meter is UVB. It won't register any milliWatts/Sq. m with UVA only. Last year in Seattle, it wouldn't budge past 0.00 mW/square meter until about 10:45am in the Spring and on. It's quite accurate for the UVB it's detecting, but it's good to take about 10 measurements at a time at various angles of the sun to know what's happening. Other weather charts and Dminder are more INACCURATE because they often don't account for altitude.

### JanSz — 2017-02-28T17:18:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-209437>

Glyphosphate=roundup

Until recently that made me think of weeds that have to be killed so lawn would be without them.
But, it is not enough to stop using it to be affected by it.
Other than weed killing, Roundup have another use.
To help food industry feed us, Monsanto in an effort to extend growing season developed wheat that would stay green even if snow falls on it.
Farmers have to harvest dry wheat (when the plant is already dead and dry).
Easy, at proper time they spray roundup to kill wheat.
Now when farmer harvest the wheat there is a lot of shaking and some or lots of Roundup gets airborne.
It stays in the clouds until it falls with a rain (on everybody).
So one does not have to eat wheat to get his fair share of Roundup.
Even in very low nnEMF areas there is a rainfall.
/

So when someone wants to have a whole grain food he is getting that with it (on top of his/her Roundup dose).
Instead of bran he is getting sand paper that cuts the intestinal wall.

There are still heritage variety available that have "normal" softer bran and the rest of the grain.

### Scompy — 2017-03-05T19:19:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-209699>

**March 5, 2017. Mitochondrial Calcium Antennas?**

I had a solid dream last night and woke up this morning thinking about calcium deposits. It asked me questions like this:

Does the cristae also act as a giant antenna to receive and give out orders?
Could the cristae help dole out orders to liberate bone when it senses energy management is a problem?
Are calcium deposits places where the mitochondria can no longer reach, but can still SIGNAL with the mitochondria to leave that dead area alone?

The dream started thinking about the body's immune response in bone marrow. The mitochondria were directing the immune response all the way into the bone marrow from other places in the body. Meaning, every time the body is stressed like in the brain (nnEMF, emotional, etc.), the mitochondria were calling an immune response from the skull (bone) to bring calcium into the system. But the dream had me seeing that the calcium itself was 'configured' based on the immune response called almost like a song to give off the specific type of calcium (maybe compound) desired for use in the cell to make it the energy work the best for the situation of the music. Literally, like the mitochondria was acting as the conductor in a symphony. The dream ended on mitochondria directing calcium into a small antenna in a vein, then pulling back showing the entire body (the bones in the body) as an entire antenna.

So I did some poking around for mitochondria and calcium, and came up with this:

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/27637331](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/27637331)

### Scompy — 2017-03-07T20:35:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-209832>

**Scompy's DHAvo Hack /w Quantlet**

Now that spring is around the corner, I am integrating some past knowledge to try a mitohack. It's an alteration of my diet in part as more sun is becoming available. I'm going to call it my "DHAvo hack" to see how it goes for a few weeks. I expect to see changes.

Avocado is loaded with Mg, K+ and also Phytosterols, which helps like a pre-version of Vitamin A to get Vitamin A working better (right under the skin of the avocado in particular). Plus, avocado is high in B5, fiber and some other goodies. I've been doing a lot of seafood & egg through the winter, but now I will also mix in a bit of horseradish+tumeric for flavor with the avocado to power it up even more. (Over this last winter, I've omitted avocado now for a good 3 months and realize I've lost some major benefits from the Alien-fruit.)

I've been doing IF typically around 14 to 18 hours a day on average (non-eating windows) and will keep it there. I'm not going to be too worried about if I'm 'in ketosis' or not, because the IF puts me in a more ketotic state around 1am to 7:30am most days before eating breakfast. I am still eating lower-carb diet that winter is about over, but bringing back the avocado gets me from the 2pm late lunch to the next morning with no issues of muscle cramping or feeling lowered energy, hungry, etc. (great past results have proved this in my world). I've also found nettle tea and lemon balm teas in the evening help here also, and for great calming for a better sleep (cortisol control).

Breakfast starts around 7:30am and pretty much looks like at least 40g of protein with egg or fish, plus an avocado mix. I often end the breakfast with a small wedge of 85% dark chocolate to cleanse the palette and sprinkle in some resveritrol and to help my world with nnEMF exposures for the day.

Late lunch generally looks like soup or salad with moderate protein like an egg. I'll usually get some garlic and onion at lunch with my meal. I often have a low-sugar kombucha or a pickle to help my gut. Then again, ending out the lunch with an avocado.

Typically, I'll skip dinner entirely since my last meal was around 2pm, unless I workout hard in the afternoon. If I do, I'll just snack on an avocado with a bit of cheese after the workout also. Tahini or hummus is a good choice to mix into the avocado (many types of hummus don't have any oils added). In this case, I'll be close to x3 avocados max in a day, but usually x2 on average. Dinner is often now just an herbal tea (no sugar or honey).

Given my great past results with the avocado, and seeing what it's like without it, I'm going to see how this goes in the next few weeks to see if I get my major benefits back with extra energy and a deeper sleep. I'll report back again if the Alien made a difference; granted, I'm also getting up near UVB 6 about every day here at 3,500 feet, so in tandem, it should be a powerful synergy. Quantlet should arrive this week also. Once I get results again with the avocado addition, then I will weave this in a few times per week while grounding in the sun to see what happens with synergies.

### Scompy — 2017-03-16T07:18:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-210437>

If you missed this on JK's doctor page today (O.M.G.)...I have to save it in my journal.

While I am vacationing in the Gulf of Mexico I had to interrupt my relaxation for you because this paper is too important to ignore and not bring to your attention. Astrocytes Control Circadian Timekeeping in the Suprachiasmatic Nucleus via Glutamatergic Signaling. More proof of my teachings for you come true: We can remodel the circadian pacemaker in the SCN using sunlight. Phosphate biochemistry in th eposterior SCN and astrocytes drives the activation and deactivation of all proteins in cells by controlling this mechanism in the SCN. Phosphorus is very active photosynthetically with sunlight.

So why do I continue to bio-hack the periodic table of elements? Because I know life is quantized, just like the periodic table is, and I am interested in finding out why cell biology uses specific atoms for its semiconductor materials. It turns out phosphorus is one of our base key semiconductors used in the circadian clock mechanism. When phosphorus is lost in the body it almost is always due to renal disease which adversely affects the RBC's mass due to erythropoeitin production. This is why anemia is a great redox sensor and low RBC's mass won't allow you to remodel your clock fast or well enough. This once again re-enforces the connection of phosphate to sunlight and RBC mass in blood plasma. Phosphorus is the key element in understanding how animals use photosynthesis in blood and in our cells. Phosphorus and phosphatase enzymes containing proteins control the flow of charges in blood and our cells to affect the remodeling of the posterior SCN.

When you have a phosphorus issues due to a light mismatch or spectral deficiency, or we have a lack of solar light we lose the charging ability in our cells. This loss slows SCN remodeling and adaptation to environmental changes. This allows us to lose "charges" in our blood plasma and the cells suspended in the blood. So how are charges lowered? Inflammation is positively charged. Light radiation from the sun and magnetic flux from the Earth's core can enter hemoglobin from the blood plasma drives charge movements in RBC's and water to affect the SCN astroacytes and the RPE in the retina to change neuronal redox tone.

Remember that blood plasma is 93% water and both the RPE and SCN are surrounded by oceans of CSF and blood plasma. CSF is 99.8% water by volume. This charge movements in cells and proteins suspended in water is able to generate secondary electromagnetic waves in these tissues which drive further charge movements for cells to use. When sunlight hits our skin or our RPE nitric oxide is released and 40-60% of our blood volume migrates to the skin or the RPE surface to absorb this light in hemoglobin and water to alter the chemistry of the blood and astrocytes using phosphorus and phosphorous containing proteins as the critical element to charge separate water to harvest the sun's power and to generate energy by splitting water to create hydrogen.

Hydorgen is the ultimate fuel of a mitochondriac to sculpt their SCN for proper adaptation. Red blood cells have a large amount of phosphorus containing proteins in them. Objects with a higher emissivity radiate MORE energy than objects with lower emissivity. In other words, when our tissues and cell have a higher net negative charge due the presence of electrons they seem to be more energized by sunlight and grounding. We lose these effects when we lose this net negative charge. This means the tissues and cells around our skin and blood re-emit much higher radiation, and it is this secondary radiation, in the IR range that energizes the blood plasma, RBC's and WBC's and platelets to keep us well.

This means that electrical plasma of the sun can easily simulate a red shift in water, tissues and our cells. This makes sense because our 4th and 5th cytochromes are photoactivated to work better with red light frequencies. This "emissivity mechanism" is why glutamate is so dangerous when humans bury the sun or insulate their feet from the Earth. It turns out the amino acid glutamic acid becomes highly charged when its side chains are altered by electric charges to form glutamate. This is why glutamate is considered an excitatory neurotransmitter in humans. Many researchers and people falsely blame its presence for many diseases, but this is short sighted. It turns out what is pathologic is when it is the secondary re-emission of light from water, cells and our tissues are altered that is the real cause of these diseases. Stressed cells release too much ELF-UV and this is the pathologic step in the process.

Because glutamate is highly charged protein, it draws secondary IR light emissions toward itself because of its moving charges. In this way, glutamate is like a light switch on cell membranes in all eukaryotes. This means it can turn on and turn off optical stimulation solely related to the light frequencies and density that another adjacent cell emits. If a cell emits too much light, like cells do under duress, this causes too much excitation in the tissue. It is not the presence of glutamate that is the problem as some have postulated, instead, it is the excessive light released by stressed cells that is the key to the etiology of the pathology. This is why glutamate exerts its effects in mammals by binding to and activating cell surface receptors. Recall that all cells liberate ELF-UV light. Mitochondrial degradation of glutamate also contributes to insulin release when glutamate dehydrogenase is allosterically activated by solar light. This is why high levels of glutamate and insulin can also be linked to many disease etiologies in humans because it is a sign that mitochondria energy production has to offset the energy losses from the sun or magnetic flux. If mitochondrial function is not up to this task the system undergoes energy failure. This is where we see the development of metabolic syndrome. Time to go see a gorgeous sunset from this boat in the Gulf in Mexico. Enjoy your night.

Like, I was playing Zelda, and I dropped the controller, contorted in pain, and then lay there staring at the pause screen until my WiiU's power save setting turned it off an hour later, hoping the pain would stop, which it did, eventually."
>
> I'll leave it at that.

### Scompy — 2017-06-25T00:33:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-217030>

Dr. Becker wrote this in 1990 on the Risk/Benefit ratio:

"We do not live in a risk-free society. Many of the beneficial technological devices we use are potentially dangerous, yet we continue to use them because we believe that the benefit exceeds the risk. The best example is the automobile, which is involved in a great many injuries and deaths each year. However, the structure of our society is such that the majority of the citizens feel that the car is essential. Most of us take the usual precautions against accident and injury, and we accept the risk that they may occur. In this case, each individual makes his or her own risk/benefit analysis.

I have found that there are many misconceptions about the health risks associated with electromagnetic fields. The most common is the assumption that such fields arise primarily from external environmental sources. Most people are unaware of the substantial risks associated with the use of many devices in their own homes. It is not logical to fiercely oppose the installation of an electric-power transmission line, while using an electric blanket every night.

Because our global society runs on electromagnetic energy, there is really no place to hide. Even in the most remote mountain valleys on is exposed to some level of the ubiquitous power frequencies of 50 or 60 Hz, as well as to shortwave radio waves reflected back from the ionosphere. Resolution of the problem will require a concerted international effort. However, as individuals we have some control over the electromagnetic devices that we use every day. All we need is an understanding of these devices and of the comparable risks associated with each, and a knowledge of how to evaluate the risks in a rational manner."

\--Dr. Robert O. Becker (Cross Currents, pg. 268, ISBN 0-87477-536-1)

Scompy: I wonder what Becker would say about how people use phones and tablets now in 2017 and continual exposures with his Risk/Benefit ratio, especially in comparison to the automobile and the proliferation of RF EMFs. In 1990 when this was written, it was before bi-directional mobile phone with towers. In our current 4G world, I'd like some QUOTE "smart" UNQUOTE epidemiologist to figure out the # of deaths that could be linked to nnEMF exposures vs. car-accidents. Conventional wisdumb pounds the common citizen to believe car-accidents and blunt-damage is always going to trump dying from a disease. But, what happens when the epidemiologist adds up the neurological diseases, many of the cardiovascular diseases (having mitochondrial intersections with VGCCs, etc.), and all of the norm we have with brain-fog and distractions that could be associated with mobile phone or gadget use. Now with WiFi being put all over in public places and on public transport, and soon the IoT, 5G and Smart Cities coming, the exponential potential of exposure should already be a serious topic among the mainstream media. Instead, we get crickets and chirps on the topic.

### Scompy — 2017-07-21T21:11:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-219662>

What if I Told You...

What if I told you governments will be reversing smoking laws due to "Smoker's Rights" and allowing everyone to smoke in workplaces, schools and restaurants again.

What if I told you leaded fuel was back on the market for your car, lead-based paints could be used once again in all homes and schools, and leaded pipes could transport our water because it's a good idea to lower costs.

What if I told you companies need not use filter systems on their chemical stacks, asbestos could be used again and we should all just "chill out" with invoking any fear around these issues, because some in modern medicine say our lungs could easily filter out these "non-confirmed" carcinogens.

What if I told you there is another carcinogen that appears worse than what is written above... A carcinogen that makes all of the above look like child's play. But even worse, the carcinogen is invisible to the naked eye and we've been exposed to it over 100 years. This carcinogen has even more science behind for over 40 years showing a wide range of detrimental influences upon life. The World Health Organization recognized it many years ago and the exposure to this carcinogen has growing exponentially in the past 20 years.

And what if I told you people willingly allow the carcinogen in their lives and upon their children several hours or more each day. And this same carcinogen appears to be linked to all of our modern diseases that have been experiencing from the neurological to the cardiovascular to a wide range of cancers.

What is this mysterious carcinogen? Why isn't it ever talked about in the mainstream? Could the reason be that it forms the fundamental network of society and we rely greatly upon it? Could it have influences upon our emotions and mental processes? Could altering, reducing and eliminating the knowledge of this carcinogen to the masses benefit those that have the knowledge?

Are you not curious at all? Why not? Would you rather believe I've just written a work of science-fiction? Could it be that this very issue has been painted as science-fiction, on purpose, over many decades to get society to believe it's fantasy.

Unless you're over 120 years of age, it's been with you since birth and around you for all of your life, unless you happen to be located away from it. Babies are exposed to it in the womb and you probably were as well. However, the latest generation of children...this last 20 years of human history, has been given a far greater dose size.

What if I told you this mysterious carcinogen is not biochemical at all, and directly impacts the biophysics mechanisms in all life upon the planet...and it is fundamental to the physics of nature, but has been altered to our detriment. What if I told you humans produce "a native, non-carcinogenic form" for our benefit: from our hearts and brains and within every energy-producing mitochondria in every living cell in the body.

Welcome to the modern era of electricity and radio-frequencies: the "nnEMFs" as non-native electromagnetic fields and frequencies. There it is--the carcinogen around us built upon the basis of all modern society. As humans, I believe we are smart enough to design better infrastructures and methods to use nnEMFs for minimal impacts upon life, less exposures to us, and more containment. We have to reinvent the powergrid, reinvent how we use our mobile phones, think about the widespread use of WiFi, satellites that beam RF/Microwave upon us daily, rethink where people live closer to these nnEMF-producing devices, and so forth. In the meantime, people need to implement "EMF hygiene" until society wakes up to the problem as REAL, not science-fiction. If we are smart, we will find smart solutions to our previous rampage of physics without considering its biological influences.

Why did I write this? I want our world to be healthy and happy. I want the future generations to thrive and prosper. I don't want future generations that will suffer greatly to label us as standing on the sidelines, while contributing to the grand mess we've created. I am an EMF WARRIOR empowered with knowledge that others may lack... and how "native EMFs" are beneficial and how "non-native EMFs" are detrimental. It's time to tell everyone you know about this issue before the brain fog strikes you as well: before the next case of autism or dementia, or worse, before the next glioblastoma.

[https://www.emfwarriors.com/latest-news/the-call-for-safe-cities-mind-games-part-iii-of-iii](https://www.emfwarriors.com/latest-news/the-call-for-safe-cities-mind-games-part-iii-of-iii)

### Scompy — 2017-07-25T06:49:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-220004>

A long-time friend and mentor of mine, Stan, died last week of cancer at the age of 54. He taught me a lot of system design techniques in video games. He was extremely intelligent and a pioneer in the tech-industry. A month before his passing, he said this on social media...

Friend: What's on your bucket list?

Stan: Honestly, I just want to spend more time with the kids doing stuff outside. They're spending far too much time with their devices and I'm not happy with where things are heading. A lot of it is my fault. I used to work from home and my dev team was in Ireland so I work around the clock. They see me in my office almost 24/7 in front of a screen so I was setting a terrible example. It is tough cuz I know that is their future. As we are getting more connected daily, soon the traditional paradigm of a work place will no longer exist. They will be locked into a fully digital world that will be far more demanding of their time and I know there will be absolutely nothing that I can do to change that. So before they get there, I figure I'll do whatever it is in my power to slow things down a little... So I'm dragging their butts to Big Bear for the holiday weekend.

Friend: I totally agree with you Stan. It's a problem that most parents face and the techie parents have to deal with the issue of "Do as I say, not as I do." My wife and I watched this last night and it was very surreal as we realized this is what our kids see sometimes.

Stan: At least these guys are physically moving around...

Friend: When I was 10, my dad and I started learning golf. We played cheapo courses and spent all weekend together finding new courses. Being outdoors, different courses/trees/wildlife and just hanging out was great. It's basically hiking, carrying 30-40lb bag, with the addition of hitting the ball. I also learned to never give up. You'll always have a bad hole or entirely bad day, so you just practice and try again another day. Also to stay calm and positive with every swing, no matter how bad you did a second before.

Stan: You are still a terrible golfer. Just saying...

### Scompy — 2017-08-17T03:44:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-221793>

> [Mystic Rose60 said:](/goto/post?id=221787)
>
> The absolutely comprehensive mind-fuck that has been done to the human race is unfathomable to all but a few. Don’t be a herd member! It’s a lonely road to walk at times but the rewards are immeasurable. When you muster the courage to walk the road of selfhood and swing the sword of truth, your mind and spirit are no longer owned by anyone else, they become your own and you have claimed the prize Scompy!

Thanks, key word here is courage. Courage to do the right thing is required in the face of what has been happening. It's impossible to make us into automatons, in part because we know too much, but also that we're cranking up our biophysics compared to some of those around us that embrace things greatly and question things rarely.

For all of my life, I have walked my own way and people often have scratched their heads around me seeing my choices. I remember when my gym teacher my Freshman year in high school told me I had to try out for Football after doing 10 chin-ups on the bar and being one of the larger boys in the school. He worked on me several weeks saying how great I'd make his team. When I came to me for about the 4th time asking to sign up, I told him I'd be joining the Astronomy club and liked to play soccer for fun, not for competition. I had taken up juggling by skateboarding down to Oregon State University and hanging out with college folk. These things interested me more in 1984 and seeing if I could get Straight As. I could see the expression on his face as if he had lost his dog. But I also went to 100s of football games over the years, more for the strategy of the game... the chess pieces in play.

Each of us will have different bonuses and advantages for others, when each of us has become a leader over his or her life, rather than giving into appeasement. In this modern world, we are getting less choice while also having to compromise our positions, and indirectly our health. This is a slippery slope toward giving up the power each of us holds, and because it's often a slow and subtle loss of power, or even invisible like on the issue of nnEMFs having it proliferate into our worlds without asking, only those truly awake can see how so many elements have changed out from under us. I like to use the Twinkie example: in 1976, it had five ingredients: wheat, water, creme, sugar and salt. Look at what it became 30 years later.

Even with these challenges, I am continually optimistic people can wake up. One of the greatest tactic is emulation, so yes, it requires enough people placed around the world to be a beacon of light for those that have no understanding why their worlds have become dark or how to fix it when their time of need arrives.

### Scompy — 2017-08-21T07:57:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-221986>

Got a great CT Biohack Success in the works. Here are my steps:

0\. About x3 times per week...
1\. Intermittent fast until about 2-3pm
2\. Hydrate well around 5pm.
3\. Around 6pm, fill tub with cold water. I get 56F here in Bend with my water system! No ice required, but because body temp can heat it up faster than with ice, after 10mins, refill with more cold water.
4\. After 20mins, cold shower for the last 10mins getting spots the bathtub was hard to reach.
5\. Shiver.
6\. Watch what happens in the morning....

Losing about 1 to 2 pounds per day. During the night, producing a LOT of water. Feeling super refreshed in the mornings after waking up.

I think the synergy with the heat-loss from the lack of food past 2pm, and the CT at the same time is doing something special.

### Scompy — 2017-08-23T21:51:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-222106>

"Mitochondria are fundamental structures that fulfil important and diverse functions within cells, including cellular respiration and iron-sulfur cluster biogenesis. Mitochondrial function is reliant on the organelles proteome, which is maintained and adjusted depending on cellular requirements. The majority of mitochondrial proteins are encoded by nuclear genes and must be trafficked to, and imported into the organelle following synthesis in the cytosol. These nuclear-encoded mitochondrial precursors utilise dynamic and multimeric translocation machines to traverse the organelles membranes and be partitioned to the appropriate mitochondrial subcompartment. Yeast model systems have been instrumental in establishing the molecular basis of mitochondrial protein import machines and mechanisms, however unique players and mechanisms are apparent in higher eukaryotes. Here, we review our current knowledge on mitochondrial protein import in human cells and how dysfunction in these pathways can lead to disease."

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/28765093](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/28765093)

### Scompy — 2017-08-24T06:00:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-222148>

**Dark Chest of Wonders by [Nightwish](https://www.google.com/search?q=Nightwish&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAONgVuLQz9U3yEmqLAEAsNWRGgwAAAA&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwiFzKS37-7VAhXPzRoKHXWhB8IQMQgrMAA)**

Once I had a dream,
And this is it.

Once there was a child's dream,
One night the clock struck twelve,
The window open wide,
Once there was a child's heart,
The age I learned to fly,
And took a step outside.

Once I knew all the tales,
It's time to turn back time,
Follow the pale moonlight,
Once I wished for this night,
Faith brought me here,
**It's time to cut the rope and fly...!**

_\[Chorus:\]_
Fly to a dream,
Far across the sea,
All the burdens gone,
Open the chest once more,
Dark chest of wonders,
Seen through the eyes,
Of the one with **pure heart**,
Once so long ago.

The one in the Big Blue is what the world stole from me,
This night will bring him back to me.

Best cover I've ever seen.

### Scompy — 2017-08-30T07:31:56+0300

**Yo, all parents!**
The new school year is coming up fast. This year in particular, I'm hearing a lot of talk about compulsory "forced" use of tablets in many schools now. Teachers want to hire a baby sitter of course, so they can surf periodically on their devices, so tablets give them a great incentive to continue their blue-lit addictive behaviors.

So how do we combat this insanity?

1\. Show the teacher and admins the RF warning inside of all tablets. Because it says "Keep the device away from the body", remind the teacher/admin that the manufacturer does not want anyone TOUCHING the tablet while the RF is active. If the school official has half-a-brain, the person will realize this is a serious LIABILITY issue. Ask the teachers to either offer a WIRED tablet (not preferable), keep all Tablets in Airplane mode while children are in the classroom, or give NORMAL pencil and paper assignments as an alternative. [http://showthefineprint.org/see-the-fine-print](http://showthefineprint.org/see-the-fine-print)

2\. Tell the teachers and admins to educate themselves by taking an EMF course or seminar available online: [http://course.wirelesseducation.org/](http://course.wirelesseducation.org/)

3\. Remind the teachers and admins that other countries have already adopted wired and safe-tech standards outside of the USA: [https://ehtrust.org/cyprus-issues-decree-banning-wireless-kindergarten-elementary-school-classrooms/](https://ehtrust.org/cyprus-issues-decree-banning-wireless-kindergarten-elementary-school-classrooms/)

4\. Remind teachers and admins that Bill Gates and Steve Jobs never let their children use the tech they created:
[http://www.independent.co.uk/life-s...ad-children-technology-birthday-a6893216.html](http://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/gadgets-and-tech/news/steve-jobs-apple-ipad-children-technology-birthday-a6893216.html)

### Scompy — 2017-09-11T00:20:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-223321>

[http://i.imgur.com/DcQON5t.jpg](http://i.imgur.com/DcQON5t.jpg)

Some basics for knowledge acquisition. From the book _**Overpowered**_ by Martin Blank, PhD, parts taken from pp. 27 to 30.

"POWER AND ENERGY

"Two terms frequently used in discussing electricity and EMF are \*energy\* and \*power.\* In common use, these terms are often interchangeable. In physics, however, these are distinct concepts, and for the purposes of EMF science and safety standards, it is important to understand the difference.

Energy reflects the ability to perform work. The higher the frequency of EMF, the more energy it has (and the more work it can do). So visible light has more energy than RF, which has more energy than ELF (and so on, across the EM spectrum).

Power (measured in W) reflects the rate at which work can be performed. The higher the power of a given \*energy\*, the more work the electricity can perform. So an EMF signal of 300 Hz could be generated with 5 W or 50,000 W, in which case the SAME SIGNAL is being radiated with very different levels of power (the 300 Hz signal generated with 50,000 W of power could travel a much greater distance).

It is a long-held belief that the less energetic EM radiation in the lower end of the EM spectrum is less damaging to the body than higher frequencies. ELF is less damaging than RF or microwave, and X-rays are more damaging than ELF, RF and microwave. This is why criteria for safety standards are different in each range of the EM spectrum.

However, we know that even low-energy EMF can cause bodily damage (such as a lightning strike or the electric chair), while a person does not feel a low-powered radio signal (such as the transmission from a nearby baby monitor) that is composed of waves that can be a million times more energetic.

The fact that significant biological responses to EMF can occur across the EM spectrum, show that the focus on \*energy levels\* in the discussion of EMF public health and safety is largely irrelevant. Nevertheless, it has been used to justify significant differences in safety limits for the different groups of EMF known as ionizing and non-ionizing radiation...This focus on energy has obscured the real biological measures of harmful responses, such as reactions with DNA...All EMF is bioactive."

See the energy and power here:

[http://nightwish.com/en/lyrics/endless-forms-most-beautiful/sagan-bonus-track](http://nightwish.com/en/lyrics/endless-forms-most-beautiful/sagan-bonus-track)

### Scompy — 2017-09-24T20:30:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-224242>

Oh great, I learned I have 2 variants for AMD (Age-related Macular Degeneration):

1\. The CFH gene provides instructions for making a protein called complement factor H. This protein is part of the immune system that helps the body fight foreign invaders such as bacteria and viruses. It is important for the body to regulate this system so that healthy cells are not destroyed unnecessarily. Complement factor H, together with other related proteins, helps regulate this system by turning it off when it is not needed.

2\. The ARMS2 gene provides instructions for making a protein whose function is still unknown. This protein is found primarily in the retina and the placenta. Research is ongoing to figure out what this protein does and how it might influence development of AMD.

**When it develops**
AMD is rarely diagnosed in people under the age of 50. Vision loss related to AMD usually becomes noticeable in a person's 60s or 70s and tends to worsen over time.

**Typical signs and symptoms**

-   Blurred or distorted vision
-   Vision loss
-   Yellow fatty deposits in the retina called "drusen"
-   Blood or fluid leakage in the retina

**How common is the condition?**
AMD affects about 2% of individuals over the age of 50 in the U.S. Approximately 2 million Americans are currently living with AMD.

**How it's treated**
There is currently no known prevention or cure for AMD. Having regular eye exams can help detect early signs of the condition. Progression of AMD can be slowed with the use of certain treatments and medications.

The nnEMF story makes a lot of sense. I know first-hand nnEMF exposures lead to blood leakage. So Mr.23andme, I know how to prevent it, liars!

The major advantage of using fullerenes as medical antioxidant is their ability to localize within the cell to mitochondria and other cell compartment sites, where in diseased states, the production of free radicals takes place."
>
> Hmmmmmm.....
>
> [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2676811/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2676811/)

If you scroll towards the bottom, there's a 18 minute Vimeo video to listen to.

"Shungite has one curious feature, among others, - ability to almost mirror magnetic radiations, especially those of industrial origin. During the recent decades, the load of industrial radiations on human beings is only increasing. We are surrounded by light and power cables, computers, TV sets, microwave ovens, and cell phones. This is why such a unique geomagnetic mineral able to reflect waves is a real pickup for us. Other studies were carried out at the State Institute of Biophysics under the Ministry of Health of the Russian Federation: they placed eggs in 3 hatchers, 100 eggs in each. 97 chicken pipped in the first, common one. In the second one, with a mobile phone put inside and incoming calls sent time after time, only 26 chickens pipped! In the third one, with a similar mobile phone with regular incoming calls separated from the eggs by an anti-electromagnetic shungite cover, 94 chickens pipped! This experiment shows bad influence on living embryos from radiations of mobile phones, as well as proper protection properties of the shungite cover. Alongside with reflection of [electromagnetic radiation](http://www.drtalmor.com/shungite#), shungite is universal as a means of protection from geopathic zones, and as an amulet, to harmonize and restore the human biofield. Besides, shungite is a reassuring stone absorbing negativity."

### OptimalSkr — 2017-10-09T20:10:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-225370>

Hi scott. I'm in the market for a new desktop pc. Do you have any resources or advice on what to get/avoid in regards to emf issues? Thanks.

### Scompy — 2017-10-09T20:20:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-225371>

> [OptimalSkr said:](/goto/post?id=225370)
>
> Hi scott. I'm in the market for a new desktop pc. Do you have any resources or advice on what to get/avoid in regards to emf issues? Thanks.

It really varies so much per machine, it's hard to know until measuring the electric fields and magnetic fields. As a general rule, look for a machine that doesn't have a fan on the video card and make sure placement of the computer is as far away from your space as possible. If you have it all hardwired and the bluetooth shutdown in it, then getting the components farther away from the body including where the wires are running. I also smooth out the sine wave in the cords with ferrite cores. The biggest issue I've found is the DE (Dirty Electricity) generated from any computer in the walls. I use filters in my office spaces against the DE for this reason. Without my filters, I'm 400+ GS units (10x the DE) with just one computer+screen on. With the filters, it pulls it back down under 20 GS units.

Smart to get a desktop over a laptop. Also, the casing of the desktop can matter...the thicker and more grounded, the better.

### Scompy — 2017-10-23T01:46:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-226410>

Had to write this on EMF Warriors a few days ago... Several people got the message.

Careful offering advice. You'll find you won't get much out of me except for my own personal experiences. Yes, I will point you toward other papers, articles and links you can judge. Any self-profound 'experts' or those that claim themselves to be an 'authority' on a matter, or people that are living with ailments and believe they solved them may feel very compelled to share. Go ahead and share experiences, but make it clear this is what \*you do\* and what \*you think\* as an obvious opinion, rather than making a blanket statement for the public and others. I will call out BS when it smells rancid.

Let individuals learn and decide for themselves. We are not them and we are not privy to their details. Give them time to learn and grow. Even though we want to be helpful for others to fix their worlds immediately, we make judgment calls if we do so and no one can understand the conditions and factors in a person's world. This is best left between a patient and a doctor. We need to let others seek knowledge first and learn the edges around this issue. What works for you may not work for someone else due to the variables and conditions in a person's life.

As one example, let's say you "ground/earth indoors" via your wall-socket as you sleep at night, and you believe it has helped you. Offering this same advice to someone else is foolish... do you know how the home is wired, what's going on in the neighborhood, when electronics can kick on (furnaces, water heaters, etc.), the flow of energy through a home, how well the home is grounded with grounding rod(s), the material composition of the ground itself, time of day variances, etc.? A plethora of factors can taint the outcome.

Think Russian Roulette. Environments each person puts themselves in externally and internally often matter greatly. And other factors can change over time... at TimeA, everything can be fine and at TimeB, things can change out from under us. Think Twinkies....how the ingredients have changed from 1976 vs. the packaging in 2006... they look and taste about the same do they not, but they are radically different from each other biochemically. People will hyperfocus on GMOs, heavy metals and molds for good reason, but often miss the obvious in front of them like the very water they drink, or the lack of getting outside due to their personal behaviors living and sleeping electrified, or being around fields or frequencies that were never found in nature 200 years ago.

And for each individual, there are biological factors, potential genetics, potential epigenetics, past damage to specific tissues, current redox states within certain systems, mitochondrial heteroplasmic mutants in a single cell compared to the other cells around them, it gets deep fast. Some people may benefit from information, others may find additional problems appearing. Think supplements and pharmaceuticals, there are side-effects directly and indirectly due to a myriad of potential conditions.

Stay alert and don't volunteer your advice for the masses. Instead, present logical positions based on personal experience. Or find credible scientific journals to show potential links. Then let the individual judge for oneself out of common respect. Thanks.

I love how music has many connections and hints to the truth...In this case, Gwen grew up in Orange County and experienced Dizzyland's mental traps many times. Nice job Gwen, nice job.

**TRAGIC KINGDOM**
**Once was a magical place
Over time it was lost**
Price increased the cost
Now the fortune of the kingdom
Is locked up in its dungeon vaults
The castle floor lies in traps
With coiled wires set back
**Decoyed by old cheese, now the drawbridge
Has been lifted as the millions
They drop to their knees**

They pay homage to a king
Whose dreams are buried in their minds
His tears are frozen stiff
Icicles drip from his eyes

The cold wind blows as it snows
On those who fight to get in
On heads that are small
Disillusioned (disillusioned) as they enter (as they enter)
They're unaware what's behind castle walls
But now it's written in stone
The king has been overthrown
By jesterly fools
**And the power (and the power) of the people (of the people)
Shall come to believe they do rule**

They pay homage to a king
Whose dreams are buried in their minds
His tears are frozen stiff
Icicles drip from his eyes
Welcome to the tragic kingdom
Cornfields of popcorn
Have yet to spring open

Have they lost their heads
Or are they all blind mice
We've heard all their stories
One too many times
Hypnotized by fireflies
That glow in the dark
Midgets that disguise themselves
As tiny little dwarfs
**The parade that's electrical
It serves no real purpose
Just takes up a lot of juice
Just to impress us**

They pay homage to a king
Whose dreams are buried in their minds
His tears are frozen stiff
Icicles drip from his eyes

Oh they drip from his eyes into an eye
They drip from his eyes

They pay homage to a king
The king who's buried, buried in their minds
They drip from his eyes
Welcome to the tragic kingdom
Cornfields of popcorn
Have yet to spring open

### Scompy — 2017-11-07T05:46:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-227510>

[Scott Compton](https://www.facebook.com/scott.compton.37?fref=ufi) At the heart of your question is the design of safe technology. For the industry to be pushed harder in that direction, they need to admit they have a problem with non-ionizing pulsed frequencies outside of the SAR thermal standard. Right now in history, we are at a crossroads in time where any entrepreneur is able to create a company to make and promote safe technology on the nnEMF issue adopting strict standards. When enough of the population is aware that nnEMFs are a problem to their health, consumers will demand more safe technologies. The entrepreneurs will have had a head-start over the telecoms and other parts of industry that continue to use the heat standard.

For lower frequency EMFs, there are many intelligent designers for homes and buildings that can help with better, healthier environments. They will also go into demand when more people look for lower EMF environments.

[Scott Compton](https://www.facebook.com/scott.compton.37?fref=ufi) Another problem we are all facing is the continual changing environments with nnEMFs (non-native to the planet). As 5G rolls in and the 4G older frequency backbone grows more with even more intensity of power, it's hard for people to know what they are getting outside of the home coming into the home on all fronts: magnetic and electric fields, stray voltage, microwave/RF and dirty electricity harmonics. We need more building biologists and people knowledgeable how to have things mitigated ahead of time.

We have standards for asbestos and lead paints when buying a new home but NOTHING for the EMF environment inside of the home, around the property and what's coming in from the outside and above into the purchased $$ airspace around the home! Plus, no assurances that 1 year after the home is bought that the nnEMF environment doesn't change out from under the home owner. This issue is a large mess until the governments are liable to tell the buyers about the energy they bring into a property from the outside. I've argued in the past that because E-mc^2 and we cannot have trespassers on our property, and energy and light is equivalent to mass, why can't a person ask in a court of law to prevent other energies or light frequencies from trespassing onto the property also or above the airspace that was purchased?

[Scott Compton](https://www.facebook.com/scott.compton.37?fref=ufi) For your initial question, I fully agree. To dismiss technology or anything for that matter that offers us a threat is not realistic for society. What is reasonable is to reduce risk and call it out. Same reason why we have airbags and seatbelts in vehicles... some people can choose to omit all technology or choose not to drive a car either. But the majority of the society will continue to use cars, and cars can cause damage also. The main problem we currently face is that few in industry are willing to admit we need seatbelts and airbags for nnEMFs. They don't want the liability that is coming....

### Scompy — 2017-11-11T21:11:11+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-227804>

**Saturday 11/11/2017**

**EMOTIONS ARE FREQUENCIES**

If you _**come to expect**_ a person is negative, you _**create more**_ negativity in yourself. Onlookers can perceive your negativity toward another. Casting negativity upon a person for too long is analogous to eating trickle of sugar all day because it's invoking cortisol and an insulin response. Resentment is one of the worst toxins on the planet. When a negative invoked emotion occurs too frequently, you may come to no longer see _**enough good**_ in a person, because, it is a choice _**you made**_ to wear the "negativity blinders" to harm yourself biochemically by judging another and not letting it go. Instead, choose love in the face of battle. Substitute the anger and fear, with love instead, especially during the raging storm. _**Come to expect**_ a person is loving because deep down, every person _**wants**_ to be loving and to be loved. If you _**come to expect**_ a person is positive over time, you **_create more_** love in yourself. But you also create a positive atmosphere infectious to those around you that lifts up everyone's health. You send out a frequency that can promote the changing of an unwanted behaviors for starting anew. Onlookers will perceive you are judging lovingly, and may attain a higher ability to self-reflect and judge oneself first before placing blame upon another for the emotions invoked. This is my method to kill resentment in oneself and in others. --Scompy

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-228316>

**"Star Wars Explains the Greatest Secret of All Time!"**

Popular culture works best spread the word about an issue, so Myster Spock pondered deeply, creatively and wisely as to what subject could get the masses to consider the impacts nnEMFs. In fated irony, the concept could go viral and attract millions of people, and it's not Star Trek. In Myster Spock imagines a person going to Youtube and seeing a video that says:

"Star Wars Explains the Greatest Secret of All Time!"

The narrator explains how all Star Wars movies are a giant analogy for the battle we face today in our modern world: the battle between TECHNOLOGY and NATURE. Anyone that has watched Star Wars sees a giant piece of technology known as a "Star Destroyer" that happens to be in a solar system with 2 suns. We know as humans the sun is the giver of life and health. Luke Skywalker focuses upon both suns in a timeless scene, while the Star Destroyer looms above. It appears the entire galaxy is being run by an "Imperial Empire" that controls the lives of people with the use of technology.

What soon becomes mind-blowing are the stark differences between native and non-native EMFs throughout the movie series. The two EMF-producing droids crash on the desert planet Tatooine. R2D2 makes sad beeps after C3PO is pissed off to no end, so they part ways. It is clear technology cannot get along with itself and plays a large role in the lives of everyone. Most are dependent upon technology to make water and rely on droids to survive, even though the old wise man called Obi-Wan with this mysterious "Force" appears to survive quite well being closer to nature and even more "off-grid."

After Luke and Obi-wan meet up and escape the planet with Han Solo, we realize "The Force" is labeled as some type of weird, magical instinct built into life. Han Solo is the first to dismiss this "Force" as C3PO plays technological chess with Chewbacca. Also, we find out that Chewy is pissed off to no end when he loses the game of Chess. A moment later, Obi-Wan feels the lives of millions scream out in death as Alderaan has become toast due to a "Death Star." Han Solo is still optimistic to visit Alderann because, well, it rocks. After they arrive from Hyperspace, they discover the planet has become a bunch of rocks instead. Pun intended.

Princess Leia reminds General Tarkin that the Empire has created a "technological terror" as the Death Star: the perfect name-choice implying it is the taker of life rather than a giver of life as a "Life Star." Darth Vader is standing nearby breathing heavily like he does, kept alive by high nnEMF emitting technologies. Once Han and Luke save Leia from the heart of the greatest technological masterpiece ever conceived (probably with newer 5G tech going on also), they escape with one of the smallest pieces of technology (R2D2) with the knowledge to destroy the Death Star. This analogy is interesting to say the least, showing technology also has the ability to destroy itself.

Now it's time for battle. Will the nature-loving rebels win against the Death Star? Why are the rebels into nature so much? Is that too much of a stretch for this analysis? Hmm, well the moon about to be destroyed by the Death Star is covered in a lush forest. Plus, Luke makes the statement about taking out how he'd "bullseye womp rats in his T-16 back home" pew pew pew. \[A quick point of logic from Myster Spock: if womp rats are 2 to 3 meters tall (6 to 9 feet), they aren't exactly "small animals" Luke.\]

As the battle unfolds in the Death Star battle, we watch Vader rely on his Tie-fighter technology to destroy the rebel alliance. Luke is also told from his commanders to use his targeting system, when he DEFIES the use of technology to use his own instincts produced by The Force. Luke is not actually nuts, because he is hearing voices in his head from the pseudo-toast Obi-wan. Luke strikes the womp rat's hole and blows up the horrific chunk of technology, still tuned into the 520 kilohertz Kenobi-band frequencies speaking in his head. A John Williams theme seals the celebration.

In the Empire Strikes Back, Luke continues to receive Obi-wan's radio station frequency. He realizes he must go to "The Dagobah System" to meet a small muppet. As it turns out, Dagobah is pretty much the most off-grid anyone could get. We're talking no Alternating Current or Microwaves to speak of to alter the climate, but it is crawling with natural EMFs in every tree and muddy swamp. As it turns out, Yoda has survived to a very long, ripe age of 900+ years on a planet without any technology. Hmm, go figure. So Luke decides there's something to this crazy Force and crash lands the Xwing-tech upon Dagobah, showing once again that technology is not needed on a world where nature triumphs.

Meanwhile, Vader has asked a bunch of bounty hunters to assist him with tracking the whereabouts of the rebels in an asteroid field that could be the rocky remains of Alderaan? Anyway, Boba Fett's #1 skill is to be enSLAVEd to his technology and uses his ship to follow Han and Leia to the Smart City in the Clouds run by Lando. Lando's life is controlled by technology, and his primary communication's assistant, Lobot, is an android tech-servant with an implanted Smart Chip that wraps around the back of his brain. Meanwhile, C3PO is blasted apart and thrown into a trash-bin, as robots have no souls. Chewy saves the disposable droid at the last minute and the Wookie reassembles him backwards while eating a cookie off-screen. After Lando's treachery, Han Solo is enshrined in a new experimental technology as part of the 5G roll-out called "Carbon-freeze", but gets an emotional kiss from Leia, pissing off Lando to no end.

Meanwhile on Dagobah, Luke learns that his "Force training" consists of natural acrobatics and reliance upon his instincts. Luke faces a helmet version of himself in a cave and is an idiot for bringing technology into a natural place. Later, Luke uses The Force to pick up natural objects like rocks and sticks, he gets closer to being a Jedi Master. But the moment he picks up R2D2 with his mind, he feels the artificial EMFs and this throws him off. Luke also struggles to lift his Xwing-tech out of the swamp, due to the nnEMFs. Yoda's connection to nature overcomes the hurdle and Yoda hovers the Xwing overhead rubbing it in, pissing off Luke to no end.

Luke leaves for the Smart City in the Clouds and falls into Vader's 5G experimental trap. Since Luke is not yet a full Jedi, the EMFs coming off of his light saber are affecting his swordplay. Vader easily gets Luke into a tight spot and cleaves off his son's hand to be replaced later by technology. Learning that Vader is his father, Luke is pissed off once again, says, "screw this place" and takes a leap of faith. At the bottom of the Smart City. Now Luke is about dead and figures out how to use the 520 Kilohertz band and calls out to Princess Leia. She hears his call and sicks Chewy upon Lando to turn around the Millennium Falcon, pissing off Lando to no end.

The Empire Strikes Back movie end on a cliff-hanger with Darth Vader being pissed off to no end as Luke slips through his artificial fingers. Meanwhile, Luke puts his new artificial fingers on Leia's shoulder for a memorable, kind of creepy moment, but only after an exchange of father-to-son communication over the 520 Khz band that may have encouraged Luke to artificially hug his sister in this manner.

In Return the the Jedi, the rebels do get their "revenge" upon the Empire's technological control over the galaxy by the end of the movie. In this movie, we learn of a new and improved Death Star using 6G experimental systems. Emperor Palpatine himself is overseeing the project as the FCCC master of the dark side. (FCCC = Force, Command, Control and Communications). As you can imagine, the Emperor is also pissed off to no end after the first Death Star was x'sploded by some random rebel scum, who turned out to be Vader's own son. What are the chances?!

Meanwhile, Luke, Leia and Lando need to rescue Han on Tatooine to progress the plot and get Harrison Ford back into action. After successfully destroying Jabba the Hutt and freeing Han from his technological Carbon-freeze imprisonment as if the two-sun planet assisted the melt, the Rebels unite and learn about the Emperor's new Death Star. No surprise, the location of the new Death Star is above the Endor moon filled with some of the most ancient and unique trees in the universe, along with an insignificant culture known as the Ewoks. It tuns out the Imperials are using an outdated AC generator on the Moon of Endor that powers the 6G shield around the new Death Star. This shield is also encoded with the latest Gigahertz Frequencies marketed by the telecoms as the best intergalatic security ever created.

In response, the Rebels decide to use Imperial tech against the Empire, to piss them off when they find out. First, they use a stolen Imperial Shuttle to gain access to the Endor moon. Next, they steal Imperial Speeder bikes, and all seems well until they fall victim to a natural rope trap by a bunch of teddy bears. Eventually, they take over the facility with a small Imperial At-At walker and dismantle the shield.

Meanwhile on the Death Star, Luke finally understands the "full power" of the Dark Side from Emperor Palpatine. His power turns out to be high nnEMF purple lightning generated from small Tesla coil hand-implants. Vader cannot just stand by and watch Luke fry. Darth Vader intervenes, but it shorts out his respirator tech. Vader is pissed off to no end, and tosses the Emperor into the heart of the new Death Star--representing the death of technology and its main funding source. The Emperor dies too quickly to be pissed off about what just went down, including himself.

Vader asks Luke to remove his artificial helmet so they can look upon each other naturally, without having any modern tech to distract their last moments together. As fate would have it, Vader's smart phone was also shorted out by Palpatine, providing no distraction for Vader to look upon Luke with his own eyes. After the new Death Star x'ploded, Vader's dead corpse is taken back into the representation of nature of Endor and burned to ash. However, the smell of gears, oils and plastics contaminate the air with carcinogens among the old growth trees.

Darth Vader's body is no more, but Anakin's spirit is free again to use the natural frequency of life and his Force-essence joins Obi-wan and Yoda. Unfortunately, the spirit-threesome would taunt Luke to no end, you know, like at the most inopportune moments when he relieves himself, or when Luke indulges in a slice of cheesecake and is warned about the fat and carbohydrate content. Luke ultimately exiles himself to a remote planet where the 520 Khz band is blocked due to atmospheric interference. Luke will no longer be tormented until the arrival of his daughter via a future Dizknee property.

\-----------------

This is Myster Spock's logical analysis of the Star Wars movies. Later in the Prequels, it is revealed the power of The Force exists within "midichlorians." The power of the Electromagnetic Force exists within "mitochondria" for humans. Here we have the secret to life! It's called the Electromagnetic Force that Robert O. Becker showed clearly how it drives our regeneration systems. We also have any people today with Electromagnetic Hypersensitivity can feel electromagnetic forces emanating from electronics, other people and even animals, as our brains and hearts are known to output fields several feet away from us. How each of us uses EMFs and frequencies is paramount: benefits from the native EMFs from nature, and the negative influences from non-native EMFs of technology that influence health and well-being in the other direction.

One last thing: Beside Youtube videos, I hear FB posts can go viral also. Feel free to copy/paste.

I've never seen Star Wars. I hardly ever watch Hollywood movies. I think they're a bunch of uninteresting, button-pushing horse crap.

There's a vogue for saying "Hollywood movies are all scripted by The CIA."

I wouldn't know if that was true, but....

**The Matrix**

A bunch of people are rescued from an Orwellian dystopia c/o messages from _cellphones_ that direct them to a place called _Zion._

Face palm.

**V for Vendetta**

A bunch of people are rescued from an Orwellian dystopia c/o a _terrorist suicide-bomber_ in _Guy Fawkes drag.
_
Face palm.

**The Wachowskis**

Lana Wachowski (formerly Laurence "Larry" Wachowski, born June 21, 1965) and Lilly Wachowski(formerly Andrew Paul "Andy" Wachowski, born December 29, 1967) are American film directors, screenwriters, and producers. They are siblings, and are _both trans women._

Face palm.

**Alan Moore**

Alan Moore (born 18 November 1953) is an English writer primarily known for his work in comic books [](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comic_books)including Watchmen, V for Vendetta and From Hell. Moore is an occultist, and ceremonial magician.

Face palm.

etc.

Older games and movies play large roles...but these are extremely important platforms for shaping public sentiment and getting the mainstream to listen. This is why I believe researchers fail in connecting to the mainstream public and why I offer a special bridge knowing both sides deeply. Just putting it down into my Journal:

**KRUSE’S THEOREM:** Any significant technological advancement that man can design or invent has already been incorporated into living systems by evolutionary biology in some way. You just have to look for it. In order for the biological and medical sciences to advance, its practitioners must realize that mother nature is not only smarter and faster than they are but also smarter and faster than our best physicists and engineers have ever been. And they are all painting on the same canvas, but none of them realize it.

### Scompy — 2017-11-28T08:06:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-228988>

**Redox Regulation of Homeostasis and Proteostasis in Peroxisomes.**
[Walker CL](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/?term=Walker%20CL%5BAuthor%5D&cauthor=true&cauthor_uid=29167332)1, [Pomatto LCD](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/?term=Pomatto%20LCD%5BAuthor%5D&cauthor=true&cauthor_uid=29167332)1, [Tripathi DN](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/?term=Tripathi%20DN%5BAuthor%5D&cauthor=true&cauthor_uid=29167332)1, [Davies KJA](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/?term=Davies%20KJA%5BAuthor%5D&cauthor=true&cauthor_uid=29167332)1.
**[Author information](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/29167332#)**
**Abstract**
Peroxisomes are highly dynamic intracellular organelles involved in a variety of metabolic functions essential for the metabolism of long-chain fatty acids, d-amino acids, and many polyamines. A byproduct of peroxisomal metabolism is the generation, and subsequent detoxification, of reactive oxygen and nitrogen species, particularly hydrogen peroxide (H2O2). Because of its relatively low reactivity (as a mild oxidant), H2O2 has a comparatively long intracellular half-life and a high diffusion rate, all of which makes H2O2 an efficient signaling molecule. Peroxisomes also have intricate connections to mitochondria, and both organelles appear to play important roles in regulating redox signaling pathways. Peroxisomal proteins are also subject to oxidative modification and inactivation by the reactive oxygen and nitrogen species they generate, but the peroxisomal LonP2 protease can selectively remove such oxidatively damaged proteins, thus prolonging the useful lifespan of the organelle. Peroxisomal homeostasis must adapt to the metabolic state of the cell, by a combination of peroxisome proliferation, the removal of excess or badly damaged organelles by autophagy (pexophagy), as well as by processes of peroxisome inheritance and motility. More recently the tumor suppressors ataxia telangiectasia mutate (ATM) and tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC), which regulate mTORC1 signaling, have been found to regulate pexophagy in response to variable levels of certain reactive oxygen and nitrogen species. It is now clear that any significant loss of peroxisome homeostasis can have devastating physiological consequences. Peroxisome dysregulation has been implicated in several metabolic diseases, and increasing evidence highlights the important role of diminished peroxisomal functions in aging processes.

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/29167332](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/29167332)
