### Scompy — 2018-06-11T04:31:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-243171>

**The Story of the Soonsick Family**
**(A Fictionalization)**

_(Also partial inspiration by a comment that [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) wrote about getting stuff for free)_

Howard Soonsick and his family were offered a new home and high paying tech-job in next latest and greatest SmartCity. It was an offer Howard could not turn down: close to work right in the city, nearby parks for the children and all of the modern gadget conveniences that people can no longer life without. The city was also recently renamed to "HighFive Park" (previously Highland Park) or just "Hi5" for short, which is pretty darn cool. The phrase they used on the news to lure future home-buyers is, "You'll always find WiFi in Hi5!"

As Howard looked for his new home, he was shocked to realize how much money he would be earning. Although most homes were "Smart", had the latest surveillance tech and drones, several robots to help around the home, and geared-out with several microwave emitters in every room for 24/7 connection, the average cost for a new home was only about $250,000! Back where Howard had to work in his DumbTown, he was strapped with a $450,000 mortgage and was living paycheck to paycheck. Here in Hi5, it's a dream come true. With all of the automated vehicles around town, transportation wouldn't be an issue at all--no need for car or insurance. And think about the extra time not on a commute!

The modern designs of the SmartHomes were more than beautiful in the brochures. But when Howard and his Soonsick family arrived in Hi5, his wife was a little displeased to see faux trees as phone towers and high voltage powerlines over the property of the home and going through the neighborhood. But the AI robot assured them, "Due to the energy usage in modern neighborhoods, it's good to have enough power available to keep modern devices powered up and to maintain continual connectivity." Yep, they were convinced. Although the family didn't like the unsightly powerlines, the home itself was immaculate and they could finally have their Jetson's type of life they've always dreamed about, eating meals as a Wonka-crafted pill with supplements as a main course.

This also allowed the Soonsick Family to move away from that group of backwards people in DumbTown that would typically "fear talk" about microwave radiation and the so-called dangers electromagnetic fields. The Soonsicks believed those 18th Century half-off-their-rocker nature-lovers simply don't understand the benefits of modern day technology and how Industry saves lives like installing infrastructures after hurricanes, provides jobs to people and are just overall nice, hard-working people that strengthens our economy. It no longer mattered because the Soonsicks would literally be living a "free life" in Hi5 and wouldn't have any of those pests to confront them with health concerns.

The Soonsick family scanned their new neighborhood for a home close to 5G small-cell repeater for better connectivity. Luckily, they found one right out front of a gorgeous mansion that was relisted for $180,000! The home also came equipped with 8 smart meters, including one for each bedroom as well as the AR and VR entertainment rooms. Because the lawns, washer, dryer, dishwater and most other appliances required minimal work, it freed up even more time for the family. The solar panels on the home could also dump power back into the high voltage powerlines for extra cost-savings. What a dream come true! Less money, bigger savings account, more time with the family, convenience in every corner of the home, and none of those health-promoting naysayers to add negativity to life!

Howard and his family moved in and signed the papers. They were so excited! On the same day they moved into the neighborhood, another 2 families were also moving into nearby homes. The Fastill Family was their next door neighbor and they must have had at least 7 children, the youngest at age 3 and the oldest, Peggy Fastill, at 14 just starting high school. Howard realized how all of the latest-tech help babysit children for the parents. What a bonus! Have tech distract the kids so the parents could be free to fiddle on the internet.

Howard's new job was actually easier and less stressful, and because home was a few blocks from work, he could spend more time in the office if needed. But Howard noticed something strange. Most of his neighbors were moody and not very warm to be around. Strangely, Howard felt more of a connection to the robots and AIs, rather than other people around Hi5. He actually started to fear his kids and wife might disconnect a bit more, even though he had far more time with his wife and family. But each person had their own online or tech-activities, rather than weekend trips and family outings because there was always so much to do in Hi5. For some reason, his sexlife also diminished, so he knew he had to take action to repair the change from DumbTown to Hi5.

A few months later, Howard planned a vacation for the family. But his wife complained, "Why should we leave all of the cool stuff for nature? Plus, I want to be around Peggy, in case she passes." Howard's eyes lit up. Peggy Fastill was a teenage girl that had moved into home next door. He was shocked because just a few months back, he saw that she was best the role-model for health. He asked, "What do the doctors say? Why is she so ill?" His wife replied, "They said it was some rare autoimmunity or mitochondrial disorder again... you know probably genetic. So strange these things are popping up when they were never around just 50 years ago."

But just a week later, Peggy and her family left Hi5 to check into a specialized Genetics and Biochem Clinic. As biochemistry savants, they would attempt to find a cure for her "rare", specific, unique, only-Peggy, genetic condition. This made a whole lot of sense to Howard Soonsick because environments played little role at all concerning our health status. But this also provided the perfect excuse to leave Hi5 to see Peggy at the clinic as part of the vacation.

Although it was a struggle to leave the benefits of Hi5 (with kids screaming in the backseat for several hours also), Howard's kids were easily calmed by providing tablets to them on the roadtrip. After a few days of travel, they arrived at the Genetics and Biochem Clinic to find Peggy, Hal, Benny, Larry, Jane, Joe and a dozen other neighbors at the clinic being treated as well! Howard thought, "Wow, so many neighbors from Hi5 with strange genetics. What are the chances?!" But they all looked quite happy, and plus, he really never got along with most of them anyway. The robots were a little more interesting.

By Day 5 of the roadtrip, the kids in the backseat were going ballistic wanting to get back to Hi5. However, as reported on all of their 17 car-screens, there had been some type of "solar event" happening within a day impacting earth. Something they were calling "The Next Carrington Event." Needless to say, the Soonsicks never made it back to Hi5. The entire infrastructure of the powergrid and communication systems was affected. All of the 17 screens wouldn't turn on anymore. Howard knew they wouldn't stand a chance without any technology--their survival was at stake. How could they manage to get back to Hi5 when the GPS was down?

The Soonsick Family had no choice. They had to back-track on the road to the Genetics and Biochem Clinic: the nearest place that could help them. Once they got back to the clinic a day later, they were greeted by Peggy and their neighbors! Something miraculous had happened in just the past day! All of their neighbors were suddenly feeling much better, as if their diseases were in reversal. They gave credit to the biochemists for making such timely and effective drugs, having literally worked overnight! The biochemists shrugged at one another, but took the credit anyway. The happiness felt was almost as good as having their tech-back again. Alas, for now they would have to do things "the old fashioned way" and wait several months until the powergrid, internet and phone towers came back online again to get back to a "normal" life.

### Scompy — 2018-06-16T21:45:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-243536>

I have so much gratitude for still being alive, I decided to write this post on the International Day of Electrosensitivity. As a person that has suffered with ES and electro-intolerances for well over two decades, I'd like to mention the many contributions around the world that made it happen.

I would first like to thank the tireless efforts by many world governments, industries and individuals that provide "the spark" of non-native EMFs on a daily basis to our biology. Without your continued head-burying, misinformation and propaganda to play-down the known risks to the public about about Electromagnetic Fields and Frequencies, I don't know how many more lives could have damaged or even destroyed.

President Trump, oh where do I start. I'd personally like to thank you and each sitting President of the United States before you for never talking about the EMF issue. Your narrative control and continued cowardice to not educate the public is historical. It is such an honor to live in the USA where long-term health threats stay hidden to the masses since the 1960s when the Radiation Control for Health and Safety Act of 1968 was passed. Just between us, we both know it really should have been called the, "Radiation Control OVER Health and Safety Act of 1968" for the sheeple.

Thank you Nikola Tesla for providing the baseline systems for oxidative stress to the world via the AC powergrid. Although you were probably blissfully unaware of your health-lowering accomplishments to future generations, a special shout-out goes to you to make it all possible. No special shout-out for Elon Musk if that is what the reader was hoping for.

Ah, the Modern Medical Establishment continues to label their patients with radiation sickness as half-nuts and dismiss their health claims. It is a tough spot to be in, but you did take the Hippocrazy Oath and have the right to ignore the good 15% of the population and rapidly growing chunk as SmartCities and 5G grids are built up around the lab rats. Your over-focus on the biochemistry is impeccable to remove any thoughts of biophysics. Doctors and nurses: continue to embrace all new technologies at work, flood even more nnEMFs around the patients under fluorescent lighting and ignore what's easily found on PubMed. Never unite against how the Admins want you to work. Hypocrisy, I mean, Hippocrates would be proud of our efforts to experiment upon humanity.

Thank you to all of the hard-working executives and admins that ensure the public's exposures to your devices 24/7. Just as Darth Vader once said to his bounty hunters, "You are free to use any methods necessary, but I want them alive." The problem with knocking off humanity too quickly is profit loss. Industry, your role with both the lower powergrid fields and higher microwave frequencies is remarkable. How you can squash opposition using outdated standards is something to watch. And your control over the media to keep everyone quiet on the issue has a special place in my heart.

Thank you Bill Gates for getting children to gaze into pulsed-blue lit screens on an hourly basis in classrooms and outside of school. Parents should be quite happy to know their children's lives are so beautifully indoctrinated in the school setting today to emulate what it will be 20 years in the future when they plug in at work to check out for 8+ hours each day. Teachers, I admire your lack of willpower to confront the Admins. Why make a fuss when technology can babysit students in the classroom? Plus, it gives teachers more time to check their messages also.

Oh, and thank you Mark Zuckerberg for being straight-out naïve. Fun times in front of congress; what they actually fear is a platform like FB awakening the sheeple too much. So sad that you have a platform of power to make a difference on this issue, but instead live in the virtual reality you have created with a spine made out of rainbow-sparkled gelatin.

So there there it is... A celebration for the Modern world and the timeless marriage between Government and Industry to project the narrative that, We the Sheeple, have power and control over our lives.

I have been debating about either a body voltage meter ([http://www.slt.co/Products/BodyVoltageKits/ProfessionalTestKit.aspx](http://www.slt.co/Products/BodyVoltageKits/ProfessionalTestKit.aspx)) or the Gauss meter ([http://www.slt.co/Products/EMFMeters/ME3830B.aspx](http://www.slt.co/Products/EMFMeters/ME3830B.aspx)) -- I heard some people like the body one because it show what the body picks up, but the other one has magnetic field measurements as well......

For DE in the walls, it would be a microsurge stetzer or greenwave meter. I use the Microsurge meter because it's cheaper and measures in GS Units, which I'm used to knowing.

For body voltage, you need to know what you're doing and how to use them correctly; there's an electrical risk if a plug is not first tested before using one.

For looking at Magnetic fields, why not also get a meter that measures electric and RF to boot for a lower price?  In my pocket right now, I have the ENV RD-10 that does all three pretty well (ballpark) for about $150. The new TriField TF2 is about $180 I think and does the lower-frequencies (both magnetic and electric) nicely.

### Butters — 2018-06-22T22:33:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-244103>

Yes. I measured my guitar. It is an Ibanez RG321MH with passive pick-ups. No EMF coming out of it. My meter spikes only for magnetic when the strings are strung but it happens also when the guitar is not connected. So induction from moving steel strings only.
So far it should be safe.
But I guess every guitar should be checked as a n=1 for safety purposes.

### Scompy — 2018-06-24T22:36:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-244254>

[https://www.bendparksandrec.org/park/riley-ranch-nature-reserve/](https://www.bendparksandrec.org/park/riley-ranch-nature-reserve/)

As a general guideline, the lower the price something is, the lower the quality of that product. However, things that start out free in the first place are often worth their weight in gold like Nature itself. Some irony in the fact that our National Parks and nature preserves now cost us money to maintain, but we are generally getting a "higher quality" of nature because we pay people to maintain them well, not have humans track in their garbage, tear of the lands with vehicles, etc.

Recently here in Oregon, a new nature preserve opened up 5 blocks from my front door. It has an interesting history because the 184 acres were privately owned for a very long time. The local community banded together to expand the parks in the area and the city bought it out to help protect the wildlife. No dogs, bikes, etc. can be allowed in the park for this reason and when humans walk through it, they must obey the rules and stay on the trails. The park borders the river where there are mountain lion dens, so there are risks, but there are greater risks driving down a freeway.

When I go to the grocery store to shop, I will look at the more expensive items, on purpose, to see if it's a better product. It's not always true but a good guideline to follow. Anyone that has bought a new car off of a showroom lot is doing it with the idea it may have better quality than a used car (unless there's a lemon),...some organic foods I have purchased I know are worse that some conventional grown due to how they were stored and where they were sourced. I see this with some tree-products like avocados, but in general I'll spend more money to get something that has a higher standard of quality.

I apply similar logic with most "health"care systems. The more the price is driven down, I'd expect less quality overall because more corners could be cut. There is also a lot of bait and switch within medicine itself and medical professions. People tend to clump all of medicine under the same umbrella; in my opinion, that's the first step where they go wrong to not decipher each of the 100s of variables in medicine and how patients are treated and for what conditions. Many people will scream: I want it all and want it free! I deserve it! But because of the politics and narrative from media, everything gets lumped into the same package for the sheeple.

pHarmaceuticals and vaccines are excellent examples of the narrative-push to want people access them at a very low or free price. Here is a perfect example where something cheap or free could offer something of little quality or real, longer-term consequences to our health due to side-effects. On the flip side of the coin, would you like a highly skilled doctor that might operate on your heart when you're life is on the line? Would you pay an extra $5,000 or $10,000 in that case if you knew you could access a doctor with a track record 32% higher than other docs at the top of his game?

When it comes to what we all call "health", my personal outlook does not dismiss possibility. It looks upon all ways to heal, not just what conventional medicine pushes up on us. Each ailment can be different with each individual, which makes it way more tricky. It really is "a given" that the approaches we read on social media, magazines, etc., to heal may work for some majority of the population in clumps, but specific cases can vary widely. Don't fall into conventional wisdumb's trap.

Also, it is especially tricky to get an accurate diagnosis from a doctor for some conditions that can be mimicked by other symptoms. As many EMF Warriors know here, mitochondrial ailments may express a very wide range of diseases, but symptoms can be shared. This is why it can be dangerous to offer direct, specific advice to another individual because life is complex and we don't know the genetics, epigenetics, Redox state in tissues, environmental exposures, personal behaviors, blood panels, substances consumed, past stressors to specific organs and systems, what pathogens may be present, and all of the other variables that can influence life.

Owning my own health is key to my personal health puzzle, but individually I may also lack knowledge in an area and need others to help me keep exploring the unknown. The person that seeks for life's mysteries will keep seeking those mysteries for all of life. Science offers us closer observations to what we believe is happening, but the territory is vast and long and even after a lifetime of study, the mysteries will continue even if we end up figuring out a lot more along the way. Instead in society, patients want their doctors to have all of the answers because it helps to push away the fear that something bad could happen to their lives. At the end of the day, no one gets a Get Out of Jail Free Card from this life. All we can do is extend our lifespans with better Health Quality.

I very much believe that personal observations and instincts need to be part of our health equation because we record everything we do on our own disk drives, outside of the knowledge of our partners and doctors. For this reason, I am very direct and honest with myself when it comes to health, and will not pass off the smaller observations. I trust to know what is best for me, generally, if I have enough knowledge and wisdom to make that determination. This is how I came to recognize how nnEMFs influence me, even though they are invisible because I started putting my personal behaviors under the microscope.

Once I started being more HONEST with myself, including logging journals of times spend indoors and outside, I noticed the patterns emerge as to a huge health-influence upon my life--both the negative nnEMFs and the beneficial natural EMFs. Could my "health"care doctor diagnose the biophysics in my life? Would I expect my doctor to do this? If I hire my doctor to show up on my doorstep at 6am and kick my butt in the morning to get out of bed and go on a walk, would that be better $$ spend on my medical care? The way I see it, we have to own our personal health, but also not be afraid to access other people to help us to get to the root about how our health ailments showed up and how we can fix ourselves.

Over-focusing on one potential mechanisms, rather than the myriad of potential synergies in play in life systems, is itself a form of reductionist mentality that could cost us dearly later on, if we fail to keep an open mind about what we may have not experienced due to our personal behaviors, or may have never yet been exposed to in our knowledge to see how that new slice of knowledge may connect, adjust and synergize into the overall pie.

I'd generally agree that our doctors, researchers, biologists. medical professions, etc. may have acquired a much wider, deeper and greater knowledge pie compared to most of the population. But it still takes the mind passionate and open to all possibilities to be pliable enough to keep pushing on the scientific observations to find what we all are missing: to help change science itself for more accuracy.

Scientific observations are not facts or proof of things. They are better fits for the data points, built on observations, to help build theories that also adjust over time. When the naysayer says, "give me the proof nnEMFs are dangerous", it's clear the person asking the question is either setting a trap on purpose, or knows little to nothing about the Scientific Method itself. I always ask them back, "Um actually, can you first tell me how nnEMFs are safe? Please provide me the science where it says that."

Print from 3 months ago of a Mountain Lion 10 feet from my backdoor into my home.

### Scompy — 2018-06-28T03:39:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-244476>

We are either in control or out of control. Many parents have been seeded with the idea, "my husband or wife is 'being controlling' when parenting," as if the word "controlling" is a so horrible, bad thing to be, and some other choice is more acceptable alternative. The connotation of the word Control gets people to change their behaviors and avoid "being controlling." It's usually an illusion because it's actually lack of communication between a couple.

Parents, listen up. If one parent is not in control (often called "controlling" to paint it evil), then the child is in control instead. Does the child have your experiences, wisdom and intelligence? If you have a problem with your spouse making decisions about when to go to sleep, time spent consuming tech, etc., then grow a backbone and have a harder conversation about what tactics to use with the child, so both parents can be aligned about the best ways to use their "dual-control" over a child's behavior. What we have now is one or both parents having HORRIBLE tech-behaviors and are terrible role-models for their children, parents are not doing their job and children take the upper-hand to gain more control over a parent's lack of role-modeling.

Children love boundaries and obstacles and will be testing for them 24/7. Parents need to expect they will be tested and then respond accordingly. Sadly, when one parent attempts to establish boundaries, often the other parent may think, "I'd do it way differently" and this could result in name-calling, "You're way is 'very controlling' over our child" because the parents are not on the same page. See through the BS people before it's too late, and start communicating in your relationships. Be adults and not children. Establish the proper boundaries, then follow-through, dang it! Sometimes it is hard to follow through, but support your significant other's good intentions and find a path to parent more effectively.

### Scompy — 2018-07-06T07:57:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-245129>

As more time passes forward into a world of higher EMF proliferation, the naysayers and those highly skeptical on the EMF issue are bound to have a change of heart (mind you, their EMF-generating hearts) and come over across to our side begrudgingly. I don't see the opposite happening: more people flocking to the side of Industry as Smart Cities and the wireless public is about to experience a new volume of nnEMFs in their worlds like no other time in History.

Almost like the sheriffs showing up at the right moment in a Wild West scene, there is a great deal of incoming science headed our way, as well as a whole lot of past science already on the books--some of which has been hiding in plain sight or buried outright in less widely known scientific journals. Pubmed can be a fun adventure for the knowledge-seeking nerd, but there is a great deal missing from online sources already, and probably more gaps to come.

However, we are also entering an interesting climate on the internet, where some of the more meaningful information is harder to find. It doesn't surprise me in the least if information gets pulled, distorted or tainted from online knowledge banks with new control knobs. Just like my healthy-skepticism for science, I have the same for what I read online and how information is sourced. Personally, I get around some of the problems with actual books in my hard-copy library.

As various "entities" will no doubt continue to compete with online companies for search engines and information-storage sites, it would be insane if they would ever paint their own companies in a bad-light if they had control over larger chunks of information that a 'voting-majority' would normally consume. Just like the old phrase goes, only the winners and victors get to write the history books. But is this actually true in practice? Like Science, History is a funny thing because it is chalked full of clues for future observations if uncovered.

Delaying the inevitable and hiding evidence is needed to maintain the status-quo and retain power, obviously. There are many strategies to keep a false narrative alive such as: contort public belief with emotional impacts and Pavlovian responses, omit many wedges of information from media sources, distract the public into a state of apathy, or addict our biology to alter behaviors in favor of those in control.

But no matter what the groups or entities believe, all can fall like toy soldiers, especially when not in the business of being Pro-Health. Many interests will attempt to weaves a narrative of being Pro-Health with marketing and government-backed entities, while at the same time, damaging the health of the public. But painting desired narratives to cover tracks always has an expiration date. It is only a matter of time until more clues are uncovered and more Sherlock Holmes arrive on the scene to discover what has been going on.

### Scompy — 2018-07-16T00:15:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-245938>

It is useful to be reminded about the typical process we use to digest information and what we do with it to help our lives. As many EMF Warriors are well aware, Myster Spock ironically \*\*loves\*\* to be logical about his analyses and often uses terms like "sheeple" and "conventional wisdumb" for parts of society that can represent obstacles we face to properly change awareness in society and regain control of the narrative out from under Industry's feeble thumb that hopefully is perceived as Thor's Hammer to the sheeple, due to Industry's message, accumulation of wealth, political infrastructure and lures upon public sentiment. Yeah, that was one long sentence, but not changing it.

Having information for the sake of information, making judgments upon "just the information" and doing nothing meaningful with a library is a bit like buying Ferris Bueller's friend's 1958 Ferrari and letting it sit in the garage for 364 days of the year as an independent entity. As more time passes, the information is just collected and connections are never interwoven.

The compartmentalization into separate tanks of information works to help control minds. Just like when The Titanic sank (or what ever ship you believe this was), it was because of the synergy of the 3 of the 5 water compartments that worked together, in weight, to get it to plunge into the Atlantic. Independently, each water compartment doesn't know about the other 4 compartments.

But in synergy, the whole of all compartments can drive a system to crash or find something deeper and more meaningful. How we interpret information needs cross-sectioned for a wider analysis. If we fail to acquire enough knowledge, which often requires personal experiences for testing the information, we may never come to a deeper place of wisdom. Instead, we may skip the step altogether and create paradigms based on "experiences through the lens of information" rather than viewing our "experiences through the lens of knowledge."

When our minds are more "tomatoey-ripe" like a ball of spaghetti noodles, it can offer unforeseen an advantage to "do stuff" with the information we attain and make sense of it to create knowledge with perspective. Creativity and imagination always wins for humanity, because it can help provide perspective in new ways that can challenge the status-quo that may have gone off-their-rockers. And now we are living in a time when those on-their-rockers are viewed as being off-their-rockers, when the opposite is true.

Is it a more sane position when discovering we may want to protect health due to the discovery and the interlinking of knowledge? Or, is it a more sane position to take to make arguments based on "information acquisition" using compartment-based thinking and omitting knowledge acquisition to make judgment? Have you heard industry argue this countless times, "there is not enough information to make a proper judgment about the safety of nnEMFs?" Industry loves it when the public stays focused on information, misses the knowledge-acquisition step so that people on the streets never arrive to a place of wisdom.

The Industry-government bedfellows are well-aware that it is crucial that knowledge itself is withheld from the public eye. When links are made, dots are connected and the i's are dotted and the t's are crossed, it will force Industry's hand to up their game to keep the knowledge suppressed as they spew out more statistical data to confuse and information to distract. Industry is kept quite happy when wisdumb-buying people consume their products and restructure their lives with nnEMFs around every corner, as Nature watches on the sidelines with a huge facepalm.

Industry is trying to push Life to be more like robots and androids in the coming years. They want humans to think in terms of information rather than wisdom, so deeper questions will never be asked in a public setting. Why put egg on the face of Industry when it's providing such a good service for everyone? But by definition, Life \*\*IS\*\* Nature and it cannot be suppressed or altered into submission. Mother Nature never sits back for long because Father Time awakens her when needed.

### Scompy — 2018-07-20T21:02:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-246298>

**"You Matter. Don't Give Up."**

For the last few months driving to work by a psychiatric office, two signs showed up: "You Matter" and "Don't Give Up." Affirmations can work as a momentary reflection, but what if you were driving to work and saw both signs knocked over on the ground and half-crumpled up, but still readable?
Well, that's what I saw today. The skewing of observations helps to awaken us. Seeing something (or someone) smashed and wrecked shows to others, that even in the face of damage, the person (or sign) won't give up sharing a message to help others.

When looking at ES, EHS, Microwave Sickness, Radiation Illness or whatever you want to call it, we see the canaries in the coalmine, telling the rest of the public, what is on the horizon even though the damage is happening. When I saw the sign broken alongside the road, I didn't know how it happened. It was some type of invisible force had come along and ripped it down from my observational lens. And it may have been the wind, but I suspect it was a 13-year old hooligan on a skateboard after dusk instead. Either way, if Nature or manmade forces had ripped it down, we need to be honest about what caused the damage and back it up with observations. Do we have any industries are wielding invisible light frequencies like hooligans? You decide.

Amy Wolff is trying to feed good intention into people (in the video segment below). We have entered times when people on the streets are scratching their heads to the rise in depression, mental issues and stress we are seeing more and more. They know modern medicine isn't curing much and that bandages (with drugs) are being used to cover up neurological problems, and in many cases, making things even worse. People are trying to make sense and find solutions to deeper problems in the environments around them that they have no clue about what has been promoting and fueling neurological disease: nnEMFs in part. Imagine what we will see when the bulk of society connects the dots in the near future. It's going to be historical across the world when it unfolds...

[https://www.ktvz.com/news/dont-give-up-campaign-aimed-at-lifting-spirits/614047291](https://www.ktvz.com/news/dont-give-up-campaign-aimed-at-lifting-spirits/614047291)

### Jenelle — 2018-07-30T13:58:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-246979>

[@Scompy](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/17718/) ... I have been quietly observing the masses lately, in a new way ... and it is an almost painful point of view to have at times. You said something like that to me in my journal one day. I'll have to go look at it again.

I see what Jack is referring to when he speaks of living in a 3G-4G world... and 5G coming. The change in people. I see it. And I see it, and feel it, with my whole being, and all of my Spidey-senses ~ because it's in person. In real life experiences.

I don't watch TV, I don't read the news, I'm not on social media. And it has been that way in varying degrees for a long time. Those things instinctually, most of the time, do not make me feel good. I have said FOR YEARS to my family that I wanted to start a "good news" channel ~ where I could travel around the world, gathering \*good news\* stories to share with people. Because there is so much darkness out there ... and they amplify it. And like that new country song that my kids tell me is pretty popular these days ~ you'd lose all faith in people and this world if you only watched the news every day.

Where was I going with this? Lol. I was saying the masses do not stand up and cry out for change because \*just as you and I talked about years ago\* ~ and I think of it often ~ THE MASSES are very much (very much) like the Wall-E movie.

I could get down about it. We all could. I choose to keep going and look for the good. It's still out there. I find it in real moments with genuine people and as long as I see that and feel that, as well ~ I have not lost hope in our people. I do appreciate this place even more... where I can post something like this and I know that ~ even though I am trying to put into words what cannot be put into words ~ others will get it.

### Scompy — 2018-07-31T22:09:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-247151>

**QUESTIONS**

Asking the right questions are at the heart of finding truths... or what humans are able to observe that push us closer to truths. Many truths we dislike when we find them. We often have a natural response to shy away from what we observe, if the truth rubs us the wrong way. This bias is present in all of the naysayers over the nnEMF issue. They want to bury their heads deep within the arid sand when the science points to a wide range of biological effects over timescales with our modern nnEMF proliferation.

Industry encourages people to bury their heads, and encourages behavioral modifications to press fingers into small devices while straining eyes into screens like monkeys looking for insects on the backs of other monkeys for increased profit margins. At least monkeys are attached to grounded trees, trees as natural antennas to the sun itself, so the monkeys have little choice but to be around the natural lighting in the environments they inhabit. This descriptive language of adjectives and nouns are chosen on purpose, thought-out by design intention and worked out in my mind's eye to awaken the readers. And this last sentence as well as this sentence and the sentence after belongs in this long-winded paragraph, because I often care little about the desired structure society wishes us to obey without thinking. Rather, I care more about creativity and finding ways to make connections that one may tend to remember longer than the typical drivel that media attempts to shove into our brainholes as a way to get us to relinquish our power to them.

Wearing the hat of questioning can a very healthy endeavor instead of a crazy one, when there is enough wisdom and perspective added to the mix. When we start questioning things more deeply, it opens up additional questions that go into rabbit holes and places that society tells us not to entertain. But another question remains: do we have enough wisdom to make "sound judgments" about the knowledge we attain, and the newer knowledge that comes into our lives daily? Really, at the heart of any issue is communication and getting enough people to have enough knowledge to make more accurate judgment calls based on repeatability of the observations at hand.

Some of the most profound questions are right under our noses: the mechanics of artificial light and natural light. So I'd like to end this post on you visualizing, as you walk around today, about the PERCENTAGE of natural light that hits your eyes and skins VERSUS the PERCENTAGE of artificial light+nnEMF that hits your eyes and skin. Do you allow more Natural Light or more Artificial Light+nnEMF to hit your body if you added up the hours in a day? If you willingly receive more of the artificial than the natural, could that be considered long-term madness?

### Scompy — 2018-08-08T02:11:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-247869>

The narrative word choices in this piece are quite revealing to me, as to why I posted in part. It's feels very much like it's selling the piece to the medical establishment for their approval.

"UV light induces damage to epidermal keratocytes through p53-mediated transcriptional induction of the proopiomelanocortin (POMC) gene. POMC is then cleaved into two peptides: α-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH) and β-endorphin. α-MSH stimulates melanocytes to produce the pigment eumelanin, which tans the skin. β-endorphin, however, is a highly abundant endogenous opioid that binds to the μ-opioid receptor. Exogenous opioids that bind to the μ-opioid receptor are typically addictive."

Spock's opinions: The pulsed and artificial-light generated UV scientists used in experiments to test the carcinogenicity needs to be questioned deeply. Don't believe me? Go do your homework and look at how researchers and scientists setup their experiments from the 1980s and even today. Are they using human-produced UV, or do they use that big ball of fire in the sky that provides life to the planet in their experiments? Message to researchers: we're watching how you design your experiments.

Luckily, some humans and animals still have common sense. Yes, don't get burned. Yes, acclimate to the sun over the spring and summer. Yes, find shade. Yes, keep hydrated. Was sunscreen around even 100 years ago? Were sunglasses around for blocking sunlight 100 years ago? Are all of the bunnies, squirrel and birds using sunscreens and sunglasses? Did humans generally wither away from cancers 500 years ago? 1000 years ago? When the pyramids were built in Egypt? Are elephants dying left and right at the moment because they are out in the sun all day, or do they have the lowest cancer rates for all mammals on the planet?

[https://www.news-medical.net/health/Sun-Tanning-Addiction.aspx](https://www.news-medical.net/health/Sun-Tanning-Addiction.aspx)

### Scompy — 2018-08-08T21:30:07+0300

**Sticks and stone may break my bones, but nnEMF will insidiously radiate me without my consent.**

When damage is being dealt slowly and invisibly over time, it's quite easy to overlook the observations under our noses. Instead, we are encouraged to blame our new disease on the physical and visible choices we have around us that the mainstream will greatly assume is the full knowledge pie. We hear this list time and time again, and there is some truth in the lists we read to grab us, but much of the important truths are removed and omitted. Here is a typical list:

1\. Too much alcohol
2\. Smoking and second hand smoke
2\. Crappy food choices
3\. Lack of exercise
4\. Not enough sleep
5\. Stress from moving, job loss or relationship breakup

And these sources above can be problematic, but the media's narrative paints an issue with very broad-strokes and typically leaves out any level of detail. I see the media creating scapegoats to remove the actual truths in play. The media loves to adjust connotation to make important issues feel more benign, like "not enough sleep", when Chronobiology is a science itself and a huge gateway for our health that is very under-looked in mainstream media to this very day.

Instead, we typically lack hearing about these below:

1\. The lack of sunlight to our bodies as an anti-cancer agent
2\. The lack of grounding to the earth for an antioxidant effect
3\. The growing proliferation of RF/Microwave exposures
4\. Dirty electricity and stray voltage within specific locations
5\. Continual Power Grid and lower-frequency exposures
6\. Carcinogens and toxins in our water supplies
7\. Air quality hazards, pollutants and toxins we breathe
8\. Side effects from pharmaceuticals and supplements
9\. Food sourcing and storage specifics for product quality
10\. Hidden pathogens, toxins in injections, etc.

It's very telling to me when looking at these lists side-by-side because most mainstream narratives will imply, "the person is at the most fault for a failing health" rather than "both a person's choices and environmental exposures" are problematic in synergy.

Observation and investigation needs to be the role of our media: they are mostly useless in 2018. This is a great time for a new media to awaken and show how humanity is being spork-fed half-information to blind, deafen and shut-up the public. Why? To shut-down everyone that may poke holes in the Industry-Government firm-rated mattress. Industry fears the day when the public realizes they can remove the box-springs and rebuild the bedframes and headboards so we will no longer be continually screwed by them.

The omission of the knowledge about the mitochondria is ongoing. Internal energy generation in biological systems provides life for us, but it is generally cast away or downplayed to the general population. Our educational systems usually focus upon the stale genetics of things and breaking things down into independent events and compounds to promote a mechanical on/off, or cause/effect, or A=B thought process: rather than the actual dynamic energy processes and systems in life that have exponentiality and non-linear influences with the soup of all of the inputs, outputs, absorption, emission and balance of everything going on.

Think of any machine like a spectrum analyzer, oscilloscope, photometer, photomultiplier or an MRI. We would have a lot less information about the mechanics of light without such machines to know that most of the EM Spectrum is invisible to the naked eye. If machines were never created, we'd be back to measuring light emissions, intensities and wave forms with our retinas as the main tool: not the extended tool of a machine and only see a fraction of what light actually exists. And yes, we can always create better machines to unveil more of the world around us.

For this reason of our sensory limits, anyone that uses science as a 'hands-down proof of things' is using it like anyone would use a religion. This really will piss off atheists, because this is what they do, but I don't give a damn. It is what it is. ### Scompy — 2018-09-19T20:21:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-251355>

By the President of the United States of America:

A Proclamation.

Whereas, on the twenty-second day of September, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty-two, a proclamation was issued by the President of the United States, containing, among other things, the following, to wit:

"That on the first day of January, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty-three, all persons held as slaves within any State or designated part of a State, the people whereof shall then be in rebellion against the United States, shall be then, thenceforward, and forever free; and the Executive Government of the United States, including the military and naval authority thereof, will recognize and maintain the freedom of such persons, and will do no act or acts to repress such persons, or any of them, in any efforts they may make for their actual freedom.

"That the Executive will, on the first day of January aforesaid, by proclamation, designate the States and parts of States, if any, in which the people thereof, respectively, shall then be in rebellion against the United States; and the fact that any State, or the people thereof, shall on that day be, in good faith, represented in the Congress of the United States by members chosen thereto at elections wherein a majority of the qualified voters of such State shall have participated, shall, in the absence of strong countervailing testimony, be deemed conclusive evidence that such State, and the people thereof, are not then in rebellion against the United States."

Now, therefore I, Abraham Lincoln, President of the United States, by virtue of the power in me vested as Commander-in-Chief, of the Army and Navy of the United States in time of actual armed rebellion against the authority and government of the United States, and as a fit and necessary war measure for suppressing said rebellion, do, on this first day of January, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty-three, and in accordance with my purpose so to do publicly proclaimed for the full period of one hundred days, from the day first above mentioned, order and designate as the States and parts of States wherein the people thereof respectively, are this day in rebellion against the United States, the following, to wit:

Arkansas, Texas, Louisiana, (except the Parishes of St. Bernard, Plaquemines, Jefferson, St. John, St. Charles, St. James Ascension, Assumption, Terrebonne, Lafourche, St. Mary, St. Martin, and Orleans, including the City of New Orleans) Mississippi, Alabama, Florida, Georgia, South Carolina, North Carolina, and Virginia, (except the forty-eight counties designated as West Virginia, and also the counties of Berkley, Accomac, Northampton, Elizabeth City, York, Princess Ann, and Norfolk, including the cities of Norfolk and Portsmouth\[)\], and which excepted parts, are for the present, left precisely as if this proclamation were not issued.

And by virtue of the power, and for the purpose aforesaid, I do order and declare that all persons held as slaves within said designated States, and parts of States, are, and henceforward shall be free; and that the Executive government of the United States, including the military and naval authorities thereof, will recognize and maintain the freedom of said persons.

And I hereby enjoin upon the people so declared to be free to abstain from all violence, unless in necessary self-defence; and I recommend to them that, in all cases when allowed, they labor faithfully for reasonable wages.

And I further declare and make known, that such persons of suitable condition, will be received into the armed service of the United States to garrison forts, positions, stations, and other places, and to man vessels of all sorts in said service.

And upon this act, sincerely believed to be an act of justice, warranted by the Constitution, upon military necessity, I invoke the considerate judgment of mankind, and the gracious favor of Almighty God.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the United States to be affixed.

Done at the City of Washington, this first day of January, in the year of our Lord one thousand eight hundred and sixty three, and of the Independence of the United States of America the eighty-seventh.

By the President: ABRAHAM LINCOLN
WILLIAM H. SEWARD, Secretary of State.

"Wake to see
Your true emancipation is a fantasy
Policies
Have risen up and overcome the brave
Greatness dies
Unsung and lost, invisible to history
Embedded spies
Brainwashing our children to be mean
You don't have long
I am on to you
The time, it has come to destroy
Your supremacy
You don't have long
I am on to you
The time, it has come to destroy
Your supremacy
Supremacy"

Narrative is everything for controlling perceptions. Are we being "burned" by Industry? WATCH THE VIDEO. Adam is showing us, in part, how that old phone game of telling details about a story from one person the next is very much alive and kicking. Omission of information is often the larger problem: when details are removed from a story (AKA narrative), it typically leaves another person to make assumptions and fill in what is missing, When Person A whispers a story in Person B's ear, and the Person B whispers the same story to Person C, and the process repeats itself down to Person Z, it is rare if we DON'T GET a new story created. The wise will expect the original story may have nothing to do with the original story at all.

Do we see the narrative pattern on the EMF Issue? It is could be the largest in all history. Those that break down story-telling understand how the mental perception of the masses are controlled. Can you also see the 'hypocrazy' with how someone can be injured by hot water due to a short-term damage source, but when a person is damaged by a longer-term damage source, society can be convinced to look away from 'something implied as minor.' Society and even our court systems rarely consider, "Is it okay to be damaged at all by any source at any intensity or concentration?" Because some types of poisons and damage sources can slow-moving, many unlearned people around us tend to chalk up the injuries are 'lesser' or 'nothing to be concerned about' even though the damage could result in a glioblastoma a decade or two into the future. There are many slower-poison snake bite potentials in this world.

When human flesh is burned with 10 molar Sulfuric Acid, wounds show up very quickly. I have seen this first-hand on my arm. This is one analogy I often use for nnEMF. The Intensity of nnEMF exposures (concentration for biochemicals) is a factor, but not the only one. There are a great number of synergies at work, due to the biophysics and biochemistry involved to promote damage and disease to every single one of our 40+ trillion cells, and then attempt to heal an insult to our biology.

### Scompy — 2018-10-18T07:10:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-253567>

Are you more awake than a Cyclops, or do you just wanna sleep on it?

"By some accounts, the mythic cyclopes gave up one eye (or perhaps both their stereoscopic eyes) in order to gain the gift of prophesy. This is especially interesting since Western depictions of the cyclops often feature the fleshed-over sockets of atrophied peepers beneath a centralized forehead organ, the very spot where Eastern traditions place the "third eye" of supernatural sight.

We often equate that invisible third eye with the pineal gland, a pine cone shaped organ buried in the skull that grows no longer than a .8 centimeters. It produces several important hormones, including melatonin in response to environmental lighting.

In lower vertebrates such as fish and lizards, the optically-engaged pineal gland actually stems into a parietal eye. Parietal eyes typically appear as a grey oval on the foreheads of certain burrowing lizards (among other creatures). While the animal doesn't quite see out of this structure, the parietal eye is photosensitive and influences circadian rhythm."

[https://www.stufftoblowyourmind.com/blogs/monster-of-the-week-the-cyclops.htm](https://www.stufftoblowyourmind.com/blogs/monster-of-the-week-the-cyclops.htm)

### Scompy — 2018-10-27T05:04:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-254327>

"Later, the researchers replaced the air puff with a mild electric shock – something that would presumably command a bit more attention. The team found that neurons in the PVT tracked that change. During the air-puff phase, two-thirds of PVT neurons responded to both odors while an additional 30 percent were activated only by the odor signaling water. In other words, during this phase the PVT responded to both good and bad outcomes, but there was greater response to good.

During the electric-shock phase, however, the balance shifted. Almost all PVT neurons responded to the shock, while about three quarters of them responded to both good and bad outcomes."

[https://news.stanford.edu/2018/10/25/brain-decides-learn/](https://news.stanford.edu/2018/10/25/brain-decides-learn/)

Because there are no standards, laws or FCC Regulations about the formula of connection bars actually mean and/or how they actively update, Industry continues to get away with misinformation into infinity ∞ because the public isn't aware there is a deeper health-problem at play. Public Health and Safety is literally being played.

Now, listen to what the reporter says about each carrier using a different formula. Marketers must have known about this for a decade or more: if a telecom creates a formula that shows less bars, you have more customers flee from your service. That is their bottom line, but what they don't want to let the public know is that if a person is relying on "more bars" to minimize their RF/Microwave exposure, it can be a bad move. Instead, the media shows an app about the number of nearby phone towers that are around to make a good connection (implying that when more phone towers go up and are outside someone's window, everything is magical fairies and flying, rainbow-colored unicorns for service), omitting any health implications living and sleeping next to a phone tower 24/7.

What the media will never report is that anyone can get an EMF meter and measure for oneself. This fact is always omitted on news reports because Telecoms know very well that if even 1 in 10 people carried an EMF meter on them and saw what was going on with their own eyes, it would be game over for Industry's current marketing plan. ### Scompy — 2018-11-23T00:21:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-256291>

More about heat-shock proteins and heat stress with the mitochondria...

"Defects that occur in the biogenesis or function of the mitochondria can cause serious neurological or cardiovascular disease. To maintain proper function, mitochondria rely on around 1,000 different proteins that are imported from the cellular fluid or cytosol.

Ribosomes within the cytosol not only produce proteins for the mitochondria but also precursor proteins, which are escorted from the ribosomes to the mitochondria by chaperone proteins. Since the interior components of these chaperones increases in response to heat stress, these molecules are also referred to as heat shock proteins (Hsps). One Hsps called Hsp70 is particularly important for carrying the precursors into mitochondria."

[https://www.news-medical.net/news/20181122/Researchers-discover-new-mitochondrial-mechanism.aspx](https://www.news-medical.net/news/20181122/Researchers-discover-new-mitochondrial-mechanism.aspx)

[EMFWarriors.com](http://emfwarriors.com/?fbclid=IwAR2R7EP9F0HOH2V32UGJVnNN9qGyQsuXJtH98-YnqxhMXA_SbeAXo6L6t9Q) is helping to change the conventional thinking on EMFs to the public eye forever. There is no where for the naysayers to hide now. A big thank you to everyone who helped get this movement off the ground and continues to support us. We are a completely free resource to the public. Click on the "Continue Reading" part of this post to access the Glossary of Terminology on the EMF Issue.

Check out the [EMFWarriors.com](http://emfwarriors.com/?fbclid=IwAR2CUl43_R2QrlChNlJ4g7uw1E9oC2te54uPo3c5SxOBJSJXwF_q2ECnbFY) webpage for continual updates, new content added to the EMF Warriors Library, fortnightly blogs, new projects and much more. If anything were to happen to our FB page in the future, we would put up information on our main [EMFWarriors.com](http://emfwarriors.com/?fbclid=IwAR3qe9KMMHTfvDnUQd64hl_wr8ABllyhDfF_wlsj0Tui7dICfZSIxlWPekA) page for updates and we would put updates into our newsletter as well.

Warning! Do not advertise products here on this Closed FB site. If we catch you, even in subtle ways, expect to be shredded, culled and kicked without notice. Also, keep topics related to EMFs. No matter how noble your cause, if it's not related to our group, it's going to get removed along with any repeat offender.

Trolls. Smurfs. Shenanigators. Do not try to put down, laugh at, mock, name-call or post messages or imagery against people that may be suffering from interactions with nnEMF. It will get you muted or outright kicked immediately. We are a mature group of people and will remove childish behaviors.

Fear invocation and overly NEGATIVE posts will not be tolerated. Overly negative imagery may also get removed immediately, even if it was posted from a place of well intention. The more your post represents a negative sentiment or borders on invoking fear in people, expect it to get shredded in the cheese grinder. We can easily message and spin the toxic effects of nnEMFs in other, creative ways to help our cause. The promotion of chaos in the group, attempting troll-tactics, using fake accounts by impersonating others, or messaging people inappropriate things behind the scenes gets you banned from this group also.

The promotion of a product is a gray area... even if you are not selling and believe it has benefits, often the Admins will receive many email complaints if a post is being over-promoted due to the product in it. If this occurs, the post it may get muted or shutdown without warning. When a post that shows a product and it keeps showing up on EMF Warriors (because people are bumping it there), the Admins will take notice the bumper's names.

We know all of the Social Media games, including getting others to "team" on social media to promote products indirectly for kickbacks or friend favors. Or other games like people coming onto the site to message individual members behind our backs. If you are looking to promote or sell products, it's wise to change your behaviors here for this reason.

And since we are a closed group, using the "Share" option will not share our post to those on your public profile. FB changed their policy in late 2017 with Closed FB groups. If you want others to see our content, you have permission to copy/past anything "Scott Compton" posts AKA Myster Spock outside of the group. Out of common respect for others, please do not share anything else unless you get the permission of the person first.

We will help all that we can to teach about EMFs in all forms: the native EMFs that are part of sunlight and the Schumann Resonance, and the non-native EMFs humanity has flooded upon our planet beginning with Tesla, Edison and Marconi, and how they have propagated into our environments. We are in a time that will go down in the history books when generations look back upon what we are doing to ourselves.

Our cells and the mitochondria face more exposure to the lower frequencies of the powergrid and higher frequencies of microwaves and the electrosmog we generate in the air with our phones, WiFi, RADAR, radio, TV, baby monitors and ever-growing Smart-gadgets. Specifically in the scientific literature, we see biological influences that are created from Alternating Currents, electric fields, magnetic fields, stray voltage, Dirty Electricity, radio waves, microwaves and pulsed color frequencies. We will continue to act as a resource of information.

COMMON EMF TERMINOLOGY

nEMFs = Native Electromagnetic Fields (and/or Frequencies), These are the normal generation of fields and frequencies present in the universe and on earth due to the sun's interaction with Earth's magnetic shield to generate the Schumann Resonance, atmospheric filtering of sunlight frequencies and other natural occurrences of EMF such as lightning.

nnEMFs = Non-Native Electromagnetic Fields (and/or Frequencies), These are what humans generate artificially on the planet of any frequency, commonly to provide power with Lower Frequencies and Higher Frequencies for communication systems using Radio Frequencies, Microwave, Radar, etc. Artificial lighting is also considered a form of nnEMF.

Field or Radiation = The area around a source of magnetic or electric energy that exists a measurable force.

EM Field = Electromagnetic Field, a force field that radiates away from any moving, electrical current. It has a directionality of movement away from the electric current and contains both a magnetic field and an electric field.

EM Spectrum = A way of classifying electromagnetic fields on the basis of their oscillation frequency. The EM Spectrum begins at one end at 0 Hertz (no oscillation) or also known as DC (Direct Curent) and extends up to trillions of oscillations per second into visible light, all of which is roughly considered non-ionizing radiation. Past visible light into the Ultraviolet, X-rays, Gamma Rays and Cosmic Rays are considered ionizing radiation.

Wavelength = The measured distance between the crest of one wave to the next. Something like a "mm Wave" refers to the measured distance in millimeters of one wave's crest to the next. Typical mobile phone wavelengths are in the centimeter distance range.

Frequency = The rate at which an event repeats itself; the units for Frequency is Hz or Hertz and was named after Heinrich Hertz for the number of cycles per second. One thousand cycles per second is a Kilohertz; one million cycles per second is a Megahertz; one billion cycles per second is a Gigahertz; one trillion cycles per second is a Terahertz.

UVC = UltraVioletC, 100nm to 250 to 290nm (debated in the science)

UVB = Ultra VioletB, 250 to 290nm to 320nm (debated in the science)

UVA = Ultra VioletA, 320nm to 400nm

VVL = Visible Violet Light, 380nm to 450nm

VBL = Visible Blue Light, 450 to 495

VGL = Visible Green Light, 495nm to 570nm

VYL = Visible Yellow Light, 570 to 590nm

VOL = Visible Orange Light, 590nm to 620nm

VRL = Visible Red Light, 620nm to 650nm

NIR or IR-A = Near Infrared Light, ~ 700nm to 1,400nm range (215 to 430 Terahertz)

MIR or IR-B = Mid Infrared Light, ~ 1,400nm to 3,000nm range (100 to 215 Terahertz)

FIR or IR-C = Mid Infrared Light, ~ 3,000nm to 10,000nm range (3 to 100 Terahertz)

mm Waves = Commonly referred to as a subsection of Microwave Radiation in which the wavelength is millimeter in length, starting around 30 Gigahertz and going up toward the Far Infrared part of the EM Spectrum

Microwaves = Generally referred to as a portion of the EM Spectrum in the 500 Megahertz range all the way up to Visible Light. A very common microwave frequency is 2.45 Gigahertz used in many devices as well as Microwave Ovens. Microwaves are also generally referenced as "Higher Frequencies".

Radio-Frequency or RF = Commonly referred to as a portion of the EM Spectrum in the 3 Kilohertz (KHz) range to the 300 Gigahertz (GHz) range, but even this is subject to interpretation. Many people won't include "RF" with microwave bands, but Industry commonly references this way for added confusion. Radio Frequencies are also generally referenced as the gambit of "Higher Frequencies", and in context, either omitting the microwave bands on purpose (generally 300 Mhz and lower) or also including everything up to 300 Gigahertz.

THF = Tremendously High Frequencies (300 Gigahertz to 3 Terahertz \[3,000,000,000,000 Hz\])

EHF = Extremely High Frequencies (30 Gigahertz to 300 Gigahertz \[300,000,000,000 Hz\])

SHF = Super High Frequencies (3 Gigahertz to 30 Gigahertz \[30,000,000,000 Hz\])

UHF = Ultra High Frequencies (300 Megahertz to 3 Gigahertz \[3,000,000,000 Hz\])

VHF = Very High Frequencies (30 Megahertz to 300 Megahertz \[300,000,000 Hz\])

HF = High Frequencies (3 Megahertz to 30 Megahertz \[30,000,000 Hz\])

MF = Medium Frequencies (300 Kilohertz to 3 Megahertz \[3,000,000 Hz\])

LF = Low Frequencies (30 Kilohertz to 300 Kilohertz \[300,000 Hz\])

VLFs = Very Low Frequencies (3,000 Hz to 30 Kilohertz \[30,000 Hz\])

ULFs = Ultra Low Frequencies (300 Hz to 3 Kilohertz \[3,000 Hz\])

SLFs = Super Low Frequencies (30 Hz to 300 Hz) Technically, this includes the 50 and 60 hertz powergrids

ELFs = Extremely Low Frequencies (30 Hz to 300 Hz), but commonly this can also refer to a larger range of lower frequencies including the powergrid frequencies (SLFs).

PWM = Pulsed Width Modulation

SM = Static magnetic fields, no frequency

DC = Direct Current. Technically 0 hertz or a stead, electrical current that doesn't vary. DC is often used as a synonym for a steady-state current or process.

EE = Electromagnetic Energy

AC = Alternating Current. An electrical current that changes direction with a flow of periodicity, such as changing direction 60 times per second with a 60-cycle AC system. AC is often used to represented any current or field that varies with time, compared to DC or Direct Current. When the current it smooth, it typically exhibits a sine-wave curve.

Antenna = An interface for converting electromagnetic radiation in space into electrical currents in conductors (or vice versa) for transmitting or receiving a signal. The antenna's length (and the antennas material composition) relates to the frequency's wavelength for conduction potential.

Dipole = A separation of positive and negative charges.

Electrostatic = a natural phenomena arising from the forces that electric charges exert on each other.

DE = Dirty Electricity. The generation of additional harmonics and noise, often lower frequencies producing additional higher frequencies from powergrid sources. Dirty Electricity is typically measured in GS Units or Volts per second.

Faraday Cage = An enclosure built from a conductive mesh or metal that is used to block external electric fields and frequency sources.

Inverter = A type of machine capable of transforming AC into DC, or DC into AC.

mG = milliGauss

nT = nanoTesla

uT = microTesla

Transducer = A device that converts one form of energy into another.

Ion = An atom that has lost or gained one or two electrons, giving it an electrical charge and is chemically much more active than a neutral ion.

Modulation = The process of varying one or more properties of a typical periodic waveform, a carrier signal with a modulating signal that containing the information to be transmitted.

LED = Light Emitting Diode. A semiconductor light source. Robert O. Becker was nominated for a Nobel Prize for his discovery that bones are natural LEDs.

Photon = A component of light as a particle that carries the force in the electromagnetic field. It is often referred to as a minute energy packet of electromagnetic radiation. Generally, light has both particle and wave-like properties.

Semiconduction = A material with an electrical conductivity between a conductor and insulator. The conduction of an electrical current by the movement of electrons or by "holes" or the absence of electrons through a crystal lattice. Semiconductors conduct less current compared to metal conductors, but have great application use such as in circuit boards and transistors.

Photoelectric Effect = The emission of electrons when light shines on a material. Einstein received his Nobel Prize for this discovery.

5G = 5th Generation, refers to the latest generation of mobile phones in comparison to 1G, 2G, 3G, 4G, 4G LTE and the past generations of mobile phone technology.

IoT = Internet of Things, or the planned, future systems of Industry to use wireless technology for interconnecting Smart Cities, automated driverless cars, AI or Artificial Intelligence, and so forth.

EMF Meter = A device for measuring Electromagnetic Fields and Frequencies. For lower frequencies, meters are typically measured in milliGauss or microTesla for magnetic and electric fields. For higher frequencies, EMF meters are typically measured in milliWatts per Square meter (mW/m2), microWatts per Square meter (uM/m2), Volts/meter, etc.

### Scompy — 2018-11-29T03:36:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-256890>

EMF Warriors Pinned Post, Part 2:

COMMON BIOLOGICAL TERMS WITH RELATIONS TO EMFs...

Antioxidant = A compound that inhibits oxidation and acts as a free radical scavenger, such as Vitamin C, Vitamin D, Vitamin E and Melatonin.

ATPase or ATP Synthase = The rotor at the end of the mitochondrial ETC (Electron Chain Transport) at Cytochrome Complex V that spins for energy generation.

Autophagy = The normal biological process that deals with the destruction and recycling of cells to help maintain a normal homeostasis. Mytophagy is a specific version of the destruction of the mitochondria.

BBB = Blood Brain Barrier.

Beta Oxidation = A multiple step process in which fatty acids are broken down to produce Acetyl-CoA for use in the Citric Acid Cycle and ETC (Electron Chain Transport).

Biophoton = Photons of light released in life and biological systems. These photons are often in the Ultraviolet to Visible Light Spectrum and detected by a Photomultiplier.

Calcium Efflux/Influx = The abnormal disturbance of calcium into or out of cells or cell membranes due to channels not regulating the calcium flows in a normal fashion. See VGCCs.

Chronobiology = A new field in biology focused on circadian rhythms and internal clock regulation.

Cytochrome Complexes = Often described in reference to the structural components of the mitochondria (Complexes I through V) and the ETC (Electron Transport Chain) for generating energy for a cell.

Deuterium = An stable isotope of Hydrogen found naturally in food and water that has one extra neutron.

Dopamine = A neurotransmitter often talked about due to blue-light physics. Dopamine is a critical part of our pleasure and reward center, and directly related to cravings and addiction. It impacts many neurological disorders including Parkinson's Disease.

Earthing = See Grounding.

EHS/ES = Electromagnetic Hypersensitivity/Electrosensitivity. EHS is the more modern day term for microwave illness. In many parts of the world, it is defined as an Elecromagnetic Intolerance.

Epigenetics = Specific genetic processes dealing with adaptive responses to our environments and surroundings due to modification of gene expressions, typically in contrast to alterations in the actual genetic code.

EZ = Exclusion Zone in reference to Exclusion Zone water, a more crystalline structure of water that forms against phospholipid bilayers and cell membranes with an H3O2 configuration instead of H2O. EZ water is made of hexagonal lattice sheets like a beehive structure. As an aromatic lattice, EZ is first built by red-light frequencies, and once formed, can trap specific frequencies of light such as UV-B.

Genome = The genetic material within an organism packed in DNA. In humans, there are two genome sets: one set is bound inside of the nucleus known as the Nuclear Genome and the other, smaller set is mtDNA or the Mitochondrial genome. In plants, there are three genome DNA sites in the nucleus, mitochondria and chloroplasts.

Glial Cell = An extremely abundant type of cell that surrounds neurons to give them support and insulation in the Central Nervous System or CNS.

Glioblastoma or Glioma = A deadly type of brain tumor often associated with mobile phone use.

Glutamate = A salt version of the amino acid Glutamic Acid. As an excitatory neurotransmitter (and also rampant in the food supply as MSG, enzyme extracts, etc.), Glutamate binds to the NMDA receptors that are close to VGCCs on cell membranes.

Grounding = The act of touching the earth with a part of the body that is not insulated, such as with bare feet rather than insulated shoes.

Magnetite = A mineral that is naturally magnetic. Our eyes and brains contain magnetite and many animals use magnetite for navigation orientation.

Melatonin = A circadian rhythm hormone that is produced by the Pineal gland. It serves to regulate activity levels in the brain and is also a free radical scavenger.

Mitochondria = An organelle that produces energy for a cell. There are often many to hundreds or thousands of mitochondria in a single cell, depending on the type of cell. Mitochondria have their own DNA(genome)

Mitochondrial Biogenesis = The growth, creation and division of healthy mitochondria in a cell.

Mitochondrial Heteroplasmy = The ratio of healthy mitochondria to mutant or damaged mitochondria in a cell. As the heteroplasmy rate increases, more mutants that have accumulated in a cell compared to healthy mitochondria.

Mitochondrial Mutants = The means by which the mitochondria DNA genome has become damaged or has malfunctioned.

Mitosis = The process of cell division

Myelin = A specific type of material found in and around nerve and Schwann cells to help insulate and conduct energy.

NMDA = N-methyl-D-aspartate, a type of receptor where commonly glutamate binds, where glutamate is the body's primary neurotransmitter for signaling mechanisms. This receptor is typically located on cell membranes by other channels like VGCCs. Compounds like taurine can also bind to this receptor.

pH = The measure of the acidity and alkalinity of an aqueous solution, on a scale 0 to 14 where 7 is neutral. The more acidic the solution, the more hydrogen ions are present.

Quantum Biology = A newer, growing field of biology that is typically interwoven with the principles of quantum mechanics, theoretical chemistry and biophysics.

Quantum Mechanics = A science often referred to as Quantum Physics based in Quantum Theory, Heisenberg's Uncertainty Principle and many observations like the Double Slit experiment, that exhibit "strange actions at a distance" such as particles being in multiple states at the same time.

Redox Potential = Reduction/Oxidation Potential is a measure of the tendency of a chemical species to acquire or lose electrons through ionization.

ROS = Reactive Oxygen Species. The creation of an excessive amount of unstable molecules that contain oxygen for the generation of free radicals (often as a result of oxidative stressors).

Schwann Cells = A type of glial cell that wraps around nerve fibers.

Schwannoma = A type of tumor that covers nerves.

Vagus Nerve = A nerve that is interwoven with sympathetic and parasympathetic control of the heart, lungs and digestive tract. It also carries out many other mechanisms such as taste, movement and swallowing in the brain.

VGCCs = Voltage Gated Calcium Channels. Calcium Channels located on cell membranes for regulating the flow of calcium in and out of a cell or organelle.

### Scompy — 2018-12-06T04:33:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scompys-journal.16641/post-257365>

In response to this Elon Musk article...
**
"Elon Musk says people need to work around 80 hours per week to change the world"

[https://www.businessinsider.com/elo...l3p6dDCsFttAMLUZxBn0yKfoDfIEER7yMR4ID\_6XDE0Qo](https://www.businessinsider.com/elon-musk-says-80-hours-per-week-needed-change-the-world-2018-11?fbclid=IwAR3UX0mgLjIs3Gl3p6dDCsFttAMLUZxBn0yKfoDfIEER7yMR4ID_6XDE0Qo)
**
Scompy writes a tongue-and-cheek ABSTRACT (for all to steal if desired),...

**REVIEW: The Neuropsychiatric Effects of Sleeplessness and Absurd Deadlines in Non-Overworked CEOs**

**BACKGROUND**: The mind often projects differently than what the mitochondria are experiencing. The mental roles of what a person believes to achieve may not necessarily yield the outcomes desired due to a wide range of biological effects, including deeper redox imbalances, voltage-gated ion channel interruptions, mitochondrial heteroplasmy rate increases, circadian disruptions and the lack of human interfaces often due to the replacement with nnEMF-generating device interfaces instead. Here we investigate the typical 80-hour work week of CEOs and their desire to implement their personal behaviors, control and will upon an unsuspecting population, as a type of 'standard issue sociological design.' We will attempt to reveal if such a practice would yield either healthier specimens or more frustrated and sleep-deprived individuals, or, if there is no apparent correlation at all.

**METHODS**: We recorded the continual exposures of an 80-hour weekly time block from 2,487 overworked CEOs, over a period of time of 160 hours. We didn't measure their morning or daily sun exposures for circadian biology because the sun is so bad for humanity and all of life for that matter, especially tortoises in the tropics that only live 300 or 400 years when they could be living much longer because of the sun's ill effects. We also provided a non-misleading questionnaire to not skew the data in no particular direction, perceptively or otherwise, to the casual thinker. Some questions included their behaviors outside of a normal 80-hour work-week. We also controlled against lack-luster workers that only achieved 77, 78 and 79 hours per week. We were happy with our experimental setup and system of population control.

**RESULTS**: We did not find the 80-hour work week to be much of a problem at all. The recommendation of perceptively-cool, yet powerfully financial CEOs that make suggestions about working a minimum of 80 or more hours per week are totally awesome because they did not yield any kind of negative consequences that we could detect when loosely looking at the surface contexts about how amazing it would be to accomplish endless goals with more time available.

**CONCLUSIONS**: Because we did not find any negative biological effects, we fully and enthusiastically recommend anyone currently working between 77 to 79 hours per week to "up their game" and "kick it into gear" because they could become more powerful, financially or otherwise. Those CEOs and also the main cogs of the work-force that work 76 hours per week or less were also deemed worthless to society, so they were omitted from this Abstract completely.

### Scompy — 2018-12-19T02:55:31+0200
